raw_text:
BISHWAJIT LAHA

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader

✉  bishwajitlaha@gmail.com	📞  +91 98305 48761	📍  Gurgaon – 122006	🔗  linkedin.com/in/bishwajit-laha-92375a15





PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

OEM Partner Management

Solution & Consultative Selling

Product Lifecycle Management

Government Body Engagement

BOQ / BOM & Techno-Commercial

Compliance & Certification

Nationwide Sales Support

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem



PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.



EDUCATION



2010

MBA – Information Systems

Sikkim Manipal University

2001

B.Sc. (Hons) – Economics, Statistics & Mathematics

University of Calcutta

1998

Higher Secondary (Science)

W.B.C.H.S.E.

1996

Madhyamik Pariksha

W.B.B.S.E.



PROFESSIONAL CERTIFICATIONS & QUALIFICATIONS



2006

ACNP – Advanced Computer Network Professional | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2005

CIC – Certificate in Computing | IGNOU

2004

CompTIA Network+ (N+) | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2003

Techno Month – Unix, NT & Linux | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2003

Certificate in Computer Hardware Maintenance | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2002

DOEACC 'A' Level – PC Software, Business Systems, System Analysis & MIS



LANGUAGES



English  |  Hindi  |  Bengali



PERSONAL DETAILS



Date of Birth:	25 November 1979

Family:	Parents, Wife & Two Daughters







I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

parsed_data.name: Ashi Soni
parsed_data.summary: Oriented Operational Executive with a proven track record in managing logistics for top MNC clients such as Shopper's Stop, Landmark, and Kapiva at DTDC. Skilled in handling incoming shipments, ensuring on-time deliveries, and minimizing shipping damage. Strong expertise in compiling detailed performance reports to foster client relationships and drive business growth. sections.content:
Operations Executive - DTDC Express | Sep 2023 – Feb 2024 | Mumbai
Key Responsibilities:
1. Managed client relationships with daily logistical updates and MIS reporting.
2. Ensured client satisfaction through regular product status updates and clear communication.
3. Oversaw supply chain operations, including inventory, warehouse, and transportation management.
4. Planned and managed daily operational schedules and tasks to meet deadlines.

Operations Coordinator - Skillmatics (2024-PRESENT)
Key Responsibilities:
1. Maintain and manage data in Excel and for accurate tracking and reporting.
2. Processes purchase orders from entire sales team members and ensure timely execution.
3. Creates and presenting sales projections and order quantity reports to senior management for decision-making.
4. Coordinates and conduct meetings with clients (distributors) to maintain strong, long-term relationships across regions.
5. Ensure consistent communication and smooth operations between the company and its distributor network.
6. Oversees the end-to-end process of order fulfillment, from pickup to delivery.

cv_suggestions: Add a 'Financial Analysis' bullet under your Operations roles by quantifying cost-saving or budgeting work — for example, 'Conducted financial analysis on logistics costs, identifying X% savings through vendor consolidation,' since this skill appears most frequently in your matched jobs.

Explicitly name any TMS (Transportation Management System) software you have used at DTDC or Skillmatics (e.g., SAP TM, Oracle TMS, or any internal platform) — matched roles in freight and warehouse operations consistently list TMS software as a required skill.

Add a 'Tools & Technology' or 'Systems' section to your resume that includes any ERP, WMS, or order management platforms used in your roles, since matched jobs for Warehouse Administration & Finance Operations require demonstrated software proficiency beyond MS Office.

Reframe your MIS Reporting and Cost Management experience under your Operations Executive role at DTDC to emphasize financial reporting and budget tracking language — use phrases like 'managed operational budgets,' 'tracked P&L metrics,' or 'prepared cost variance reports' to align with Financial Services and Finance Operations job requirements.

If you have worked with any SaaS-based logistics or supply chain platforms (e.g., Zoho, Salesforce, Freshdesk, or similar tools) at Skillmatics or DTDC, list them explicitly, as SaaS platform management is a recurring gap — even limited exposure to a cloud-based business tool is worth naming.

Strengthen your Client Relationship Management bullet points with enterprise account language by specifying the scale of clients handled (e.g., 'Managed logistics coordination for 20+ enterprise clients') to better match Account Management (Enterprise) requirements seen across your matched Operations Executive roles.

raw_text:
Profile

I am a Project Management professional with expertise in industry best practices such as Agile methodologies and SCRUM. Also serving as a Customer Experience Lead for AI products, with a strong emphasis on enhancing AI product development, generating insights out of AI and user conversation, and writing prompts in GenAI tool to get the designated tasks completed out of Assistant. 

I have comprehensive experience across the entire project lifecycle, including planning, requirements analysis and scoping, effort estimation, risk assessment, product demonstrations, automation, process optimization, user experience enhancement, and data analysis for actionable insights. I am known as a collaborative team player with a positive attitude and a strong ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 





Work Experience



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2023 – Present) Delivery ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Currently managing product BUILDER and Learner Pathways development and releases for the client PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), with responsibility for project/sprint planning, design and requirement document, test cases and technical architecture reviews, sprint demos, and technical architecture oversight. Leading the product for the third consecutive year. Collaborating with the PwC development and deployment team for successful integration of the BUILDER and Learner Pathways to their Plan and Learn platform.

Led the delivery of Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) version 6.0 for MetLife over the past 5 years, overseeing all phases from planning to execution.

Managing client and stakeholder relationships, including responsibilities such as product demonstrations, requirement analysis, scope and timeline planning, sprint creation and allocations, risk identification and mitigation, budget preparation, and feature release coordination. 

Planning and overseeing the entire project lifecycle, including progress monitoring, UX design review, user guide and test case validation, task and query management, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensuring on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to maintain quality and meet deadlines through innovative and efficient practices by providing detailed requirement explanations to technical, UI-UX, and QA teams, and by ensuring alignment and clarity across functions.

Leading project data presentations during internal governance calls to report progress and key metrics.

Serving as a member of the AI Customer Experience Group, contributing to user-focused enhancements for AI solutions. Actively engaged in prompt writing, contributing to the development of effective, high-quality AI-driven content.

Participating in AI product development initiatives for global clients such as The Writing Revolution, Coca-Cola, Qatar Airways, and Kyndryl. 

Involved in AI based insights generation for conversational data. Involved in the management of NAIRA chatbot which is part of our intranet platform iniitian portal. 

Was involved in the successful end-to-end development lifecycle of Boehringer Ingelheim. Here we have used our own product CXP and have evolved it to meet the requirement. 



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2021 – July 2023) Sr. Project ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Managed the Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) for MetLife, overseeing version 5.0 and driving the transition to version 6.0. 

Managed the CXP platform for approximately 20 clients, including high-profile names like Intel, Biogen, BMS, Rolls Royce, Boeing, Bank of America, Getinge, MYOB, Anglo American, Qatar Airways, Boehringer Ingelheim and more.

Client and Stakeholder Management: Lead product demonstrations, conduct requirements analysis, manage scope and timeline planning, drive process optimization, create sprints, allocate tasks, identify and mitigate risks, oversee budget management, and coordinate feature releases. 

Planned and monitored the entire project, ensuring seamless alignment across all phases, including UX design reviews, user guide validation, test case analysis, task management, query resolution, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensured on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to meet deadlines while maintaining high quality, adhering to requirements, and utilizing innovative solutions for efficient execution. 

Presented project data during governance calls, delivering clear updates and key metrics on project progress.

Collaborated with internal teams and departments to collect feedback, address queries, and proactively enhance user experience and customer satisfaction.

Engaged in data analytics, extracting actionable insights to drive product improvements and optimize performance.



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2+ years: Jan 2019 – July 2021) Technical SpecialistLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Led requirement analysis, assessed technical feasibility, and established the product flow for various projects. 

Served as the Technical Project Manager for Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) (versions 2.0, 3.0, 4.0), UX Design, Virtual Induction/Onboarding, Data Formation for Analytics, and Micro Learning Authoring Platform—NIIT’s core product. MetLife was the primary client for these platforms.

Successfully delivered the Knowledge Management System (KMS) UI and execution, a platform containing various real estate resources integrated into e-Learning courses. This system is primarily used by RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Demonstrated strong project management capabilities, including end-to-end planning, effective communication with cross-functional teams, and the formation of development teams to execute projects successfully.



Client Communication: 

Managed client and stakeholder relationships, including conducting product demonstrations, setting up kick-off calls, understanding assignment scopes, documenting Minutes of Meetings (MoM), and allocating tasks.



Technical support, Quality Review & Mentoring: 

Contributed to UX design, ensuring the interface was user-friendly and clutter-free. Primarily used PowerPoint and Photoshop to ideate design and navigation flow.

Conducted product reviews, providing feedback to team members on quality improvement, meeting standards, reducing rework, and boosting productivity.

Provided technical guidance to project team members to help them achieve project-related objectives.

Actively mentored team members and conducted Technical Excellence training across teams and business units within NIIT.



NIIT Ltd, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR) 					 (8.8 years: April’10 – Dec 2018)

Technical Specialist Learning Content Technology, CLG (Corporate Learning Group)

Technical Project Management Responsibilities:

Developed the architecture for e-Learning using Lectora'11, which is now actively used in the production of over 200 courses for RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Created the architecture and POC for an automation tool (Bullet) that extracts content from MS Word and integrates it into Lectora's published package, also structuring courses as specified in MS Word. This tool reduced course production time by 60% and helped NIIT save costs equivalent to approximately 10 Lectora licenses. 

Designed the UX architecture for the Media Assets Library (PIXO), optimizing content management and user experience. 

Developed an HTML5-based e-Learning engine/framework, which was used to produce over 40 courses and assessments for IQVIA. Was also responsible for overseeing project execution and management.

Created various e-Learning frameworks for high-profile clients such as IQVIA, Philips, SAP, Rio Tinto, MetLife, Lavoro, and ITT. Utilized tools such as Articulate Storyline, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Articulate Presenter, Adobe Captivate, and Lectora.

Gained hands-on experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS) such as SumTotal, SuccessFactors, Cornerstone, Saba, MTS, and Moodle.  

Client Management & Ways of working:

Collaborated with clients such as IQVIA, SAP, Rio Tinto, and RECO to provide technical solutions and oversee project execution.

Took responsibility for the preparation and presentation of the Management Operating Review (MOR) deck to senior management. 

Organized and conducted technical training sessions and team meetings to ensure knowledge sharing and project alignment.







Melco, United States					        	(8 months: Aug 2009 – Mar 2010)

Technical ConsultantSupported remotely (Worked from Home) 

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to an e-commerce project utilizing Flash ActionScript 2.0, ASP.NET, and SQL Server technologies. The project involved the development of the online designer tool. 





XentaQsys Technologies Pvt. Ltd., Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)  (10 months: Jun 2008 – Mar 2009)

Project/Team Lead 

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on a Content Management System (FLOEDIT) for Deutsche Telekom, a Germany-based client, focused on managing eLearning content. The system allowed the client to publish content in three formats: Flash, HTML, and PDF. 

Visited Germany for 3 months to conduct requirement analysis and support the development of the project.





R systems International Ltd., Noida			      	(2.2 years: Apr 2006 – May 2008)

Software Engineer

Technical Responsibilities:

Primarily worked on US based various clients using Adobe Flash, HTML, CSS, JavaScript.





GE Content Solution (GENPACT)., Gurgaon		      	(6 months: Sep 2005 – Feb 2006)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on various e-learning projects, developing interactive tasks for systems like Lean, Oracle Advanced Planning & Scheduling, Oracle Fixed Assets, Oracle Process Manufacturing, Oracle Discrete Manufacturing, cBOM Editor, SWB Sales Compensation, and the GE Healthcare ROI Tool.





Magic Software Pvt. Ltd., Noida				      	(4 months: May 2005 – Aug 2005)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to e-learning projects by developing interactive tasks for Negotiating Women, Skillsoft, Daydream, Toyota Car Competition, and Clean Power with Amaze.





Academics

MCA – Shobhit University							

BCA – Patna University

cv_suggestions: Explicitly add 'JIRA' and 'MS Project' as named tools in your skills section or within bullet points (e.g., 'Managed sprint cycles and backlog prioritization using JIRA'), since these are assumed but not stated and are frequently required across Delivery Manager and Agile Lead roles.

Add a dedicated 'Delivery Metrics & KPI Dashboards' bullet under your Delivery Manager role, describing specific metrics you tracked (e.g., velocity, burn-down rates, on-time delivery %, SLA adherence), as matched roles consistently require demonstrable experience with performance reporting.

Include 'Waterfall methodology' explicitly in your skills list or role descriptions — even if hybrid — since several matched roles call it out directly; a phrase like 'Managed projects using both Agile and Waterfall methodologies depending on client requirements' closes this gap immediately.

Add a line about formal SLA reporting to your Delivery Manager experience, such as 'Defined and reported against SLAs for project delivery, escalation response times, and stakeholder communication cycles,' to align with FinTech and offshore delivery roles that require structured SLA governance.

Since FinTech domain knowledge appears repeatedly in matched jobs, add a brief domain exposure note if applicable (e.g., any projects involving financial clients, banking LMS, or compliance training), or consider completing a short FinTech fundamentals certification (e.g., Coursera's FinTech Specialization) and listing it under education.

Create a concise 'Tools & Platforms' section that lists JIRA, MS Project, and any ticketing/support tools you've used (e.g., ServiceNow, Zendesk, Freshdesk), as Delivery Manager and Offshore roles frequently screen for familiarity with support tooling ecosystems even in non-support-primary positions.

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.

cv_suggestions: Add a dedicated 'Design Wins' subsection under your AMD India role explicitly listing server/workstation platforms (e.g., EPYC, Ryzen PRO) where you supported successful customer design wins, including OEM/ODM names and volume outcomes if possible — this directly addresses the #1 missing skill for Sr. FAE roles.

Quantify your component-level and technical depth by specifying the exact AMD product families (CPUs, GPUs, APUs) you provided application engineering support for, and mention any schematic review, reference design guidance, or BOM optimization work done with OEM partners to signal component-level design expertise.

Even if PCB/embedded design is not your primary skill, add a line in your AMD role about collaborating with hardware engineers on PCB layout reviews, signal integrity, or embedded platform bring-up — this bridges the PCB/embedded design gap that appears in multiple FAE job descriptions.

Add 'Revenue & P&L Accountability' language to your Product Manager role at Pantel Technologies by stating the revenue size of product lines or tenders you owned (e.g., 'Managed product P&L for a ₹X Cr government-focused tablet portfolio'), directly addressing the Revenue P&L Ownership gap flagged by Accounts Director-level roles.

Create a 'Regional Account Coverage' bullet under your FAE/Sales Support experience that explicitly names key accounts or state government bodies you engaged in South India (e.g., ELCOT, KELTRON, Karnataka e-Governance), as Bangalore-based regional familiarity is a recurring gap and you appear to have partial coverage worth making explicit.

Add a brief 'Tools & Platforms' section listing any semiconductor distribution, EDA, or engineering tools you have exposure to (e.g., AMD's partner portals, SPICE simulation tools, or even indirect familiarity with Altium through OEM partner collaboration), and include Cloud/Managed Services keywords if you supported any cloud-adjacent or hybrid infrastructure deals in government accounts.

sections.title: Professional Experience
sections.content:
FAE / Field Support Manager | Nov 2015 – Present (10 Years) | AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR
National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.
- Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.
- Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.
- Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.
- Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.
- Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.
- Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.
- Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.

Product Manager | Apr 2015 – Nov 2015 (8 Months) | Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida
- Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.
- Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.
- Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.
- Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.
- Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.

Product Manager | Dec 2013 – Nov 2014 (1 Year) | Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat
- Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.
- Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.
- Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.
- Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.

Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations | Aug 2005 – Mar 2013 (7.5 Years) | R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata
- Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.
- Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.
- Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.
- Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.
- Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.

Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support | Oct 2001 – Jul 2005 (4 Years) | NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata
- Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.
- Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.

parsed_data.name: Anil Ladislaus D'Souza
skills: Diversity, Discrimination, Harassment, Health and Safety
parsed_data.summary: A Learning and Development Consultant with over 18 years of work experience, specializing in 'Blended Learning Curriculum Design' in the Ethics and Regulatory Compliance, Business Process, Software Application, Quality, and Soft Skill domains. As a Director of Products, Quality, and Innovation, experienced in consulting, training needs analysis, curriculum design, learning design, product management, vendor management, LMS configuration, and audio/visual production.

sections.title: Personal Details
sections.content:
Date of Birth: 16th August, 1973
Nationality: Indian
Marital Status: Married
Singapore Address: 7 Rivervale Crest Condominium, #03-19, Singapore 545085

sections.title: Areas of Expertise
sections.content:
A Learning and Development Consultant, with over 18 years of work experience, specializing in 'Blended Learning Curriculum Design' in the Ethics and Regulatory Compliance, Business Process, Software Application, Quality, and Soft Skill domains. As a Director of Products, Quality, and Innovation, I wear many hats and play many roles.

Products
- Consulting, scoping, and training needs analysis to identify learning gaps and appropriate improvement opportunities; includes identifying business goals and objectives, learning needs, audience, constraints and challenges, accreditation and continuing professional development opportunities
- Evaluate existing solutions that would meet requirements, or the need to develop new solutions in the absence of appropriate interventions
- Collaborate with stakeholders to design and develop new solutions:
  o Curriculum Design; planning the intellectual journey of the target audience
  o Learning Design; application of appropriate learning models and instructional strategies to help learners meet the specific learning needs
  o Subject matter research, storyboarding (authoring courses), visualization, media implementation and technology selection
  o Pre and post assessment design (to evaluate learning effectiveness)
- Product Catalog; planning, management, maintenance, documentation and marketing
- Product Management; budget (cost/benefit analysis), planning (timelines and schedules), communication (internal and external), and standards documentation (style guides, scalable templates)
- Vendor sourcing and management to ensure cost-effective and design-efficient solutions
- Course Authoring Technology and Learning Management Systems (LMS); Design, Configuration and Implementation
- Audio/Visual Domain; Music composition/recording, video direction/post-production

Quality & Innovation
- Continuous Improvement; analysis, strategy, process documentation and implementation
- Product Effectiveness; Feedback and evaluation strategy implementation, Metric Reporting
- New product innovation, usability, customer value improvement, defect prevention

sections.title: My Achievements
sections.content:
- Instructionally authored and published over 800 learner hours of online/instructor-led training for industry-leading firms such as JPMorgan Chase, Standard Chartered Bank, and General Electric
- Over 12 years designing Ethics and Regulatory Compliance programs in these subject areas:
  o Financial Crime; Anti-Money Laundering, Sanctions Regulation, Anti-Bribery and Anti-Corruption, Information Security and Cyber Crime, Fraud, Conflicts of Interest, Market Manipulation/Insider Trading
  o Antitrust/Competition Law
  o Data Protection/Privacy
  o Business Continuity Management
  o Diversity, Discrimination, Harassment, Health and Safety
- Designed for usability, a Brandon Hall Award-Winning Learning Management System (LMS)
- White Paper titled: Apprenticeship in an e-Learning Environment (demonstrates the Instructional Design Model and User Evaluation Feedback for a 40-hour web-based training on Design for Six Sigma)

sections.title: My Journey
sections.content:
Thomson Reuters | Knowledge Platform (Singapore) | Director of Products, Quality and Innovation | 08/2004 – Till date
Intuition Publishing (Singapore) | Senior Project Manager | 11/2010 – 07/2011
General Electric (India/US) | Assistant Manager - Lead Instructional Designer | 07/2002 – 07/2004
NIIT Limited (India) | Development Executive – Instructional Design | 08/1998 – 01/2002
Television International (TVI) (India) | Assistant Producer - Documentaries | 04/1996 – 06/1997

sections.title: My Foundation
sections.content:
Bachelor of Science (Honors) in Economics (with Mathematics and Political Science)
1992–1995    Calcutta University    St. Xavier's College, Calcutta, India

sections.title: My Personal Interests
sections.content:
My personal interests are music and drama. I enjoy composing music and hold a Grade Seven certification in Musical Knowledge and Theory and a Grade Six certification in Violin Performance from the Trinity College of Music, London. In my personal time, I am an avid, self-taught drummer, guitarist, and pianist. In 2016, I composed the theme song for the International Film Festival celebrating the Canonization of Mother Teresa of Kolkata.

An achievement that is particularly special to me is a 3-hour musical that I scripted and directed called "Mom for Christmas". I hold a Grade Four certification in Speech & Drama from the Trinity College, London.

sections.title: My Contact Details
sections.content:
Phone: +65 91262747
Email: ladislaus73@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://sg.linkedin.com/in/anil-ladislaus-d-souza-62887a

sections.title: Feedback from My Team and Internal Stakeholders
sections.content:
As of November 2016

Kelvin Loh, Product & Proposition Manager, Compliance Learning, Thomson Reuters, Singapore:
"Anil is an important member of the Compliance Learning. His valuable understanding of the business, thorough knowledge of the courses and analytical mindset to solving complex problems have been a combination of traits that have helped deliver results in APAC this year. I do find his extensive and meticulous work in course catalogs, course documentations & analysis and content roadmaps have brought much needed clarity and consistency to our effort in market ready course development and consolidation. His deep understanding of instructional design & learning strategies and hands-on working experience with learning technologies made him a reliable guru when it comes to course reviews and latest e-learning trends. I have enjoyed working with Anil and look forward to continued partnership with him in 2017 and beyond."

Claudia Westin, Director of Content, Compliance Learning, Thomson Reuters, US:
"Dear Anil,
I am gratified and honored to have a colleague within the Content team as knowledgeable, capable and efficient as you. In addition, you are unfailingly personable and always easy to work with. It's been nothing but a pleasure working with you this year.
By the numbers, 2016 has been a very successful year for the Content team. Working within a team that unfortunately lost 2.5 FTEs over the course of the year, we still exceeded the goals set for the team at the beginning of the year - particularly for new courses and course updates - by large margins. All of this - and much more - was possible only because of your contributions. You ensured that the Content team adjusted to shifting strategies, changing demands, and new leadership in 2016. You continuously liaised with instructional designers, sales, consultants planners and proposition, and distilled their feedback, requests and directions into actionable measures that you, along with the rest of the Content team, could then take up and execute. You are also an incredibly versatile and flexible colleague, equally capable of performing technical and analytical tasks as you are capable of writing a course. The latter became very important to us in 2016, and you've become an indispensable Content resource.
My comments can't capture all of the myriad ways you've contributed to the Content team as a team member this year. There are many more that I could list. I'm sincerely thankful for the opportunity to work with you.
Best regards, Claudia"

Stacey English, Head of Regulatory Intelligence, Thomson Reuters, UK:
"Anil has experienced much organisational change but has remained positive and dedicated to TR and e-learning. He cares deeply about providing customers with a quality product and has broad extensive knowledge of elearning. Anil is organised and reliable and makes great effort to contribute to meetings regardless of timezone. Thank you and best wishes Anil."

Leon Andrews, Sales Specialist, Compliance Learning & Regulatory Intelligence, Thomson Reuters, UK:
"Anil is extremely professional, responsive and well organized, not to mention knowledgeable about the content he looks after and the TR offering. He has been my 'go-to' person regarding any sort of query around our eLearning catalog as I am guaranteed a detailed, clear and concise answer within the hour even outside of his working hours. It has been a pleasure working with him and I would like to see him take greater responsibilities within our Proposition."

- Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.
- Positioned the 'Chirag' brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.
- Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.
- Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.
- Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.

Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support | Oct 2001 – Jul 2005 (4 Years) | NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata
- Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.
- Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.

raw_text:
Profile

I am a Project Management professional with expertise in industry best practices such as Agile methodologies and SCRUM. Also serving as a Customer Experience Lead for AI products, with a strong emphasis on enhancing AI product development, generating insights out of AI and user conversation, and writing prompts in GenAI tool to get the designated tasks completed out of Assistant. 

I have comprehensive experience across the entire project lifecycle, including planning, requirements analysis and scoping, effort estimation, risk assessment, product demonstrations, automation, process optimization, user experience enhancement, and data analysis for actionable insights. I am known as a collaborative team player with a positive attitude and a strong ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 





Work Experience



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2023 – Present) Delivery ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Currently managing product BUILDER and Learner Pathways development and releases for the client PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), with responsibility for project/sprint planning, design and requirement document, test cases and technical architecture reviews, sprint demos, and technical architecture oversight. Leading the product for the third consecutive year. Collaborating with the PwC development and deployment team for successful integration of the BUILDER and Learner Pathways to their Plan and Learn platform.

Led the delivery of Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) version 6.0 for MetLife over the past 5 years, overseeing all phases from planning to execution.

Managing client and stakeholder relationships, including responsibilities such as product demonstrations, requirement analysis, scope and timeline planning, sprint creation and allocations, risk identification and mitigation, budget preparation, and feature release coordination. 

Planning and overseeing the entire project lifecycle, including progress monitoring, UX design review, user guide and test case validation, task and query management, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensuring on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to maintain quality and meet deadlines through innovative and efficient practices by providing detailed requirement explanations to technical, UI-UX, and QA teams, and by ensuring alignment and clarity across functions.

Leading project data presentations during internal governance calls to report progress and key metrics.

Serving as a member of the AI Customer Experience Group, contributing to user-focused enhancements for AI solutions. Actively engaged in prompt writing, contributing to the development of effective, high-quality AI-driven content.

Participating in AI product development initiatives for global clients such as The Writing Revolution, Coca-Cola, Qatar Airways, and Kyndryl. 

Involved in AI based insights generation for conversational data. Involved in the management of NAIRA chatbot which is part of our intranet platform iniitian portal. 

Was involved in the successful end-to-end development lifecycle of Boehringer Ingelheim. Here we have used our own product CXP and have evolved it to meet the requirement. 



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2021 – July 2023) Sr. Project ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Managed the Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) for MetLife, overseeing version 5.0 and driving the transition to version 6.0. 

Managed the CXP platform for approximately 20 clients, including high-profile names like Intel, Biogen, BMS, Rolls Royce, Boeing, Bank of America, Getinge, MYOB, Anglo American, Qatar Airways, Boehringer Ingelheim and more.

Client and Stakeholder Management: Lead product demonstrations, conduct requirements analysis, manage scope and timeline planning, drive process optimization, create sprints, allocate tasks, identify and mitigate risks, oversee budget management, and coordinate feature releases. 

Planned and monitored the entire project, ensuring seamless alignment across all phases, including UX design reviews, user guide validation, test case analysis, task management, query resolution, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensured on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to meet deadlines while maintaining high quality, adhering to requirements, and utilizing innovative solutions for efficient execution. 

Presented project data during governance calls, delivering clear updates and key metrics on project progress.

Collaborated with internal teams and departments to collect feedback, address queries, and proactively enhance user experience and customer satisfaction.

Engaged in data analytics, extracting actionable insights to drive product improvements and optimize performance.



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2+ years: Jan 2019 – July 2021) Technical SpecialistLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Led requirement analysis, assessed technical feasibility, and established the product flow for various projects. 

Served as the Technical Project Manager for Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) (versions 2.0, 3.0, 4.0), UX Design, Virtual Induction/Onboarding, Data Formation for Analytics, and Micro Learning Authoring Platform—NIIT’s core product. MetLife was the primary client for these platforms.

Successfully delivered the Knowledge Management System (KMS) UI and execution, a platform containing various real estate resources integrated into e-Learning courses. This system is primarily used by RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Demonstrated strong project management capabilities, including end-to-end planning, effective communication with cross-functional teams, and the formation of development teams to execute projects successfully.



Client Communication: 

Managed client and stakeholder relationships, including conducting product demonstrations, setting up kick-off calls, understanding assignment scopes, documenting Minutes of Meetings (MoM), and allocating tasks.



Technical support, Quality Review & Mentoring: 

Contributed to UX design, ensuring the interface was user-friendly and clutter-free. Primarily used PowerPoint and Photoshop to ideate design and navigation flow.

Conducted product reviews, providing feedback to team members on quality improvement, meeting standards, reducing rework, and boosting productivity.

Provided technical guidance to project team members to help them achieve project-related objectives.

Actively mentored team members and conducted Technical Excellence training across teams and business units within NIIT.



NIIT Ltd, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR) 					 (8.8 years: April’10 – Dec 2018)

Technical Specialist Learning Content Technology, CLG (Corporate Learning Group)

Technical Project Management Responsibilities:

Developed the architecture for e-Learning using Lectora'11, which is now actively used in the production of over 200 courses for RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Created the architecture and POC for an automation tool (Bullet) that extracts content from MS Word and integrates it into Lectora's published package, also structuring courses as specified in MS Word. This tool reduced course production time by 60% and helped NIIT save costs equivalent to approximately 10 Lectora licenses. 

Designed the UX architecture for the Media Assets Library (PIXO), optimizing content management and user experience. 

Developed an HTML5-based e-Learning engine/framework, which was used to produce over 40 courses and assessments for IQVIA. Was also responsible for overseeing project execution and management.

Created various e-Learning frameworks for high-profile clients such as IQVIA, Philips, SAP, Rio Tinto, MetLife, Lavoro, and ITT. Utilized tools such as Articulate Storyline, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Articulate Presenter, Adobe Captivate, and Lectora.

Gained hands-on experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS) such as SumTotal, SuccessFactors, Cornerstone, Saba, MTS, and Moodle.  

Client Management & Ways of working:

Collaborated with clients such as IQVIA, SAP, Rio Tinto, and RECO to provide technical solutions and oversee project execution.

Took responsibility for the preparation and presentation of the Management Operating Review (MOR) deck to senior management. 

Organized and conducted technical training sessions and team meetings to ensure knowledge sharing and project alignment.







Melco, United States					        	(8 months: Aug 2009 – Mar 2010)

Technical ConsultantSupported remotely (Worked from Home) 

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to an e-commerce project utilizing Flash ActionScript 2.0, ASP.NET, and SQL Server technologies. The project involved the development of the online designer tool. 





XentaQsys Technologies Pvt. Ltd., Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)  (10 months: Jun 2008 – Mar 2009)

Project/Team Lead 

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on a Content Management System (FLOEDIT) for Deutsche Telekom, a Germany-based client, focused on managing eLearning content. The system allowed the client to publish content in three formats: Flash, HTML, and PDF. 

Visited Germany for 3 months to conduct requirement analysis and support the development of the project.





R systems International Ltd., Noida			      	(2.2 years: Apr 2006 – May 2008)

Software Engineer

Technical Responsibilities:

Primarily worked on US based various clients using Adobe Flash, HTML, CSS, JavaScript.





GE Content Solution (GENPACT)., Gurgaon		      	(6 months: Sep 2005 – Feb 2006)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on various e-learning projects, developing interactive tasks for systems like Lean, Oracle Advanced Planning & Scheduling, Oracle Fixed Assets, Oracle Process Manufacturing, Oracle Discrete Manufacturing, cBOM Editor, SWB Sales Compensation, and the GE Healthcare ROI Tool.





Magic Software Pvt. Ltd., Noida				      	(4 months: May 2005 – Aug 2005)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to e-learning projects by developing interactive tasks for Negotiating Women, Skillsoft, Daydream, Toyota Car Competition, and Clean Power with Amaze.





Academics

MCA – Shobhit University							

BCA – Patna University

raw_text:
Sanjeev Kumar Dev
sanjeevkd@rediffmail.com
+91 9891704843
4/124, Shivaji Nagar, Gurgaon, Delhi-NCR, India

SUMMARY
Award-calibre Senior Visual Design Specialist and Creative Leader with 20+ years of progressive experience spanning E-learning Development, UI/UX Design, Motion Graphics, Illustration, and Brand Identity across global MNC, government, and start-up environments. Proven track record of leading cross-functional visual design teams, delivering end-to-end multimedia and e-learning solutions for Fortune 500 clients across Asia-Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and the Americas. Deep expertise in instructional design support, Flash/HTML5 animation, infographics, and corporate communications, with hands-on proficiency in the full Adobe Creative Suite and leading LMS authoring tools including Articulate and Captivate. A versatile creative professional equally skilled as a senior individual contributor and a people manager, consistently driving brand consistency, quality standards, and on-time delivery for high-stakes global projects.

EXPERIENCE
Sr. Visual Design Specialist at Ericsson India Global Services (Jan 2015 – Present)
• Led the visual design team responsible for maintaining and enforcing brand consistency across Ericsson's global locations, ensuring all deliverables aligned with corporate identity standards set by Ericsson HQ.
• Spearheaded end-to-end online course development for global audiences, translating complex telecom and enterprise content into visually engaging, learner-centric e-learning modules.
• Drove the creation of high-impact infographics, corporate newsletters, Flash animations, and executive presentations for internal and external stakeholder communications across multiple international markets.
• Collaborated directly with Ericsson HQ on task assignment and project prioritisation, ensuring seamless delivery across geographically distributed teams and time zones.
• Project: Ericsson Global Support — Delivered sustained visual design support across multiple Ericsson global locations, standardising creative output and elevating brand presentation on a worldwide scale.
Manager, Visual Design at GENPACT (Oct 2011 – Dec 2014)
• Efficiently managed and scaled e-learning course development operations, overseeing end-to-end production workflow including client communication, task delegation, quality assurance, follow-ups, and on-time delivery.
• Led and mentored the visual design team, fostering a high-performance culture by assigning work strategically and developing team capabilities in line with project demands.
• Served as the primary point of contact for client communication, translating client briefs into actionable creative strategies and ensuring alignment between stakeholder expectations and final deliverables.
• Project: Boston Consultancy Group (GERMANY) — Partnered with European, Middle East, and American production offices of BCG to deliver consistent, high-quality visual design solutions across multiple international markets and business units.
Graphic Designer, Individual Contractor at UNODC (Aug 2013 – Dec 2013)
• Delivered a technically demanding migration project by converting existing UNODC CBTs (built in Authorware) into fully functional Flash-based CBTs, preserving the original look, feel, and interactivity with precision.
• Executed comprehensive visualization and development of complex learning scenarios, custom illustrations, interactive quiz pages, and multi-layered animations — all meticulously recreated using Flash and Photoshop to match legacy originals.
• Performed professional-grade video editing and audio editing to meet UNODC's strict multimedia quality standards, ensuring a seamless learner experience across all converted modules.
• Demonstrated exceptional attention to detail by entirely recreating numerous interactive quiz scenes and animations from scratch where source assets were unavailable, maintaining full fidelity to the original design.
• Project: GO Learn (CBT / E-learning) — Delivered completed courseware that successfully passed quality checks conducted by UNODC's central office in Vienna, validating the professional standard of all converted content.
Sr. Creative Media Specialist at Knowledge Platform (Sep 2007 – Sep 2011)
• Efficiently managed and coordinated full-cycle e-learning graphic production from concept through completion for a Singapore-headquartered global learning solutions firm, overseeing resource allocation, prototyping, graphics and animation creation, and quality reviews.
• Established and enforced graphic standards and guidelines at both project and organisational levels, elevating the visual quality benchmark across all client deliverables.
• Mentored and trained team members in visual design best practices, animation techniques, and production workflows, building internal capability and reducing turnaround times.
• Independently handled graphic development for WBT projects, HTML-based emailers, and newsletters, demonstrating versatility across multiple digital communication formats.
• Traveled on-site to Singapore to support live project delivery and conduct a professional photo shoot, demonstrating the trust and responsibility placed by the organisation in this role.
• Projects: Delivered visual design and animation solutions for an extensive portfolio of global enterprise clients including BAYER (Asia Pacific), ABBOTT, Sai Global (UK), Universitas 21 Global (Singapore), Hitachi (Japan), Emirates Aviation Training & Booking Department (UAE), Standard Chartered Bank (India), Toda Kogyo Corp (Japan), VISA (Asia Pacific), ABN AMRO BANK, Corporate Executive Board (USA), Baskin Robin (Japan), RBS (Royal Bank of Scotland), SingTel (Singapore), Morgan Crucible, Intel (USA), Horizon (Singapore), and in-house compliance and professional development products covering Data Security, Laptop Security, Credit Card Frauds, Effective Communication, Money Laundering, Instructional Design, and Six Sigma.
Associate Designer — UX (Graphics) at Magic Software Pvt. Ltd. (May 2005 – Aug 2007)
• Successfully translated complex subject matter into concrete, user-centred graphic design and interactive experiences for international e-learning and digital projects, demonstrating early-career strength in UX and visual communication.
• Created high-quality graphics, Flash animations, and original character designs for global clients including Walkgrove (UK), Fusion (USA), Credit Suisse (Switzerland), and Shell (India), supporting diverse industries from finance to energy.
• Developed character-driven visual storytelling assets that enhanced learner engagement and brought abstract instructional content to life through custom illustration and animation.
Media Executive (Graphics) at NIIT Ltd. (Dec 2002 – Apr 2005)
• Launched a career in professional graphic design at one of India's leading technology and learning companies, contributing to high-profile international e-learning and multimedia projects from day one.
• Delivered graphic design and media production work for prestigious government and enterprise clients including Smart Schools (Ministry of Education, Malaysia), Hewlett-Packard (Singapore), and MINDEF (Ministry of Defence, Singapore), building a strong foundation in cross-cultural visual communication.
• Gained deep exposure to instructional media production workflows, establishing core competencies in digital illustration, interface graphics, and multimedia content creation that underpinned subsequent career growth.
Illustrator / Cartoonist / Caricaturist at Freelancer (Jan 1997 – Present)
• Built and sustained a long-running independent illustration and cartooning practice spanning 25+ years, delivering commissioned artwork across editorial, advertising, and corporate sectors.
• Created editorial illustrations, cartoons, and caricatures for leading national and international publications and brands including Hindustan Times, Navbharat Times, Tata McGraw-Hill, Macmillan, RBS, Microsoft, Nestlé, PepsiCo, Siemens, Lease Plan, SIFY Ltd., Mumbai Samachar, Universal Journeys, and others.
• Demonstrated exceptional versatility as a visual artist, adapting style and tone to meet the distinct creative briefs of media houses, educational publishers, and global consumer brands simultaneously.

SKILLS
Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Fireworks, Adobe InDesign, Adobe Flash (Animate), Adobe Captivate, Articulate Storyline, Articulate 360, Camtasia, Adobe Dreamweaver, Sound Forge, Microsoft Office Suite, E-learning Development, Instructional Design Support, Visual Design, UI/UX Design, Graphic Design, Brand Identity & Brand Consistency, Motion Graphics, Flash Animation, Character Design, Illustration, Infographics Design, Icon Design, Cartoon & Caricature Art, Corporate Presentation Design, Newsletter Design, HTML-Based Emailer Design, WBT / CBT Development, LMS Authoring Tools, Storyboarding, Prototyping, Video Editing, Audio Editing, Creative Team Leadership, Resource Allocation, Mentoring & Training, Project Management, Client Communication, Cross-functional Collaboration, Creative Direction, Authorware (Legacy CBT Migration), Digital Storytelling, Responsive Design Principles, ATS-Optimised Visual Formatting

EDUCATION
Executive Programme Strategic Brand Management – IIM Calcutta (2016)
MBA Project Management – Algappa University, Karaikudi, Tamil Nadu (2012)
Workshop Core Project Management Concepts (Two-Day Workshop) – QAI, New Delhi (2007)
Advance Diploma Multimedia – ARENA Multimedia, New Delhi (1998–2000)
B.Sc (Hons.) Science – L.N.M. University, Bihar (1991–1994)

Project: Ericsson Global Support — Delivered sustained visual design support across multiple Ericsson global locations, standardising creative output and elevating brand presentation on a worldwide scale.

experience.title: Manager, Visual Design
bullets: Efficiently managed and scaled e-learning course development operations, overseeing end-to-end production workflow including client communication, task delegation, quality assurance, follow-ups, and on-time delivery.
Led and mentored the visual design team, fostering a high-performance culture by assigning work strategically and developing team capabilities in line with project demands.

Served as the primary point of contact for client communication, translating client briefs into actionable creative strategies and ensuring alignment between stakeholder expectations and final deliverables.

Project: Boston Consultancy Group (GERMANY) — Partnered with European, Middle East, and American production offices of BCG to deliver consistent, high-quality visual design solutions across multiple international markets and business units.

experience.title: Graphic Designer, Individual Contractor
bullets: Delivered a technically demanding migration project by converting existing UNODC CBTs (built in Authorware) into fully functional Flash-based CBTs, preserving the original look, feel, and interactivity with precision.

Executed comprehensive visualization and development of complex learning scenarios, custom illustrations, interactive quiz pages, and multi-layered animations — all meticulously recreated using Flash and Photoshop to match legacy originals.
Performed professional-grade video editing and audio editing to meet UNODC's strict multimedia quality standards, ensuring a seamless learner experience across all converted modules.

Demonstrated exceptional attention to detail by entirely recreating numerous interactive quiz scenes and animations from scratch where source assets were unavailable, maintaining full fidelity to the original design.

Project: GO Learn (CBT / E-learning) — Delivered completed courseware that successfully passed quality checks conducted by UNODC's central office in Vienna, validating the professional standard of all converted content.

experience.title: Sr. Creative Media Specialist
bullets: Efficiently managed and coordinated full-cycle e-learning graphic production from concept through completion for a Singapore-headquartered global learning solutions firm, overseeing resource allocation, prototyping, graphics and animation creation, and quality reviews.
Established and enforced graphic standards and guidelines at both project and organisational levels, elevating the visual quality benchmark across all client deliverables.
Mentored and trained team members in visual design best practices, animation techniques, and production workflows, building internal capability and reducing turnaround times.
Independently handled graphic development for WBT projects, HTML-based emailers, and newsletters, demonstrating versatility across multiple digital communication formats.
Traveled on-site to Singapore to support live project delivery and conduct a professional photo shoot, demonstrating the trust and responsibility placed by the organisation in this role.

Projects: Delivered visual design and animation solutions for an extensive portfolio of global enterprise clients including BAYER (Asia Pacific), ABBOTT, Sai Global (UK), Universitas 21 Global (Singapore), Hitachi (Japan), Emirates Aviation Training & Booking Department (UAE), Standard Chartered Bank (India), Toda Kogyo Corp (Japan), VISA (Asia Pacific), ABN AMRO BANK, Corporate Executive Board (USA), Baskin Robin (Japan), RBS (Royal Bank of Scotland), SingTel (Singapore), Morgan Crucible, Intel (USA), Horizon (Singapore), and in-house compliance and professional development products covering Data Security, Laptop Security, Credit Card Frauds, Effective Communication, Money Laundering, Instructional Design, and Six Sigma.

experience.title: Associate Designer — UX (Graphics)
bullets: Successfully translated complex subject matter into concrete, user-centred graphic design and interactive experiences for international e-learning and digital projects, demonstrating early-career strength in UX and visual communication.

Created high-quality graphics, Flash animations, and original character designs for global clients including Walkgrove (UK), Fusion (USA), Credit Suisse (Switzerland), and Shell (India), supporting diverse industries from finance to energy.
Developed character-driven visual storytelling assets that enhanced learner engagement and brought abstract instructional content to life through custom illustration and animation.

experience.title: Media Executive (Graphics)
bullets: Launched a career in professional graphic design at one of India's leading technology and learning companies, contributing to high-profile international e-learning and multimedia projects from day one.

Delivered graphic design and media production work for prestigious government and enterprise clients including Smart Schools (Ministry of Education, Malaysia), Hewlett-Packard (Singapore), and MINDEF (Ministry of Defence, Singapore), building a strong foundation in cross-cultural visual communication.

Gained deep exposure to instructional media production workflows, establishing core competencies in digital illustration, interface graphics, and multimedia content creation that underpinned subsequent career growth.

experience.title: Illustrator / Cartoonist / Caricaturist
bullets: Built and sustained a long-running independent illustration and cartooning practice spanning 25+ years, delivering commissioned artwork across editorial, advertising, and corporate sectors.

Created editorial illustrations, cartoons, and caricatures for leading national and international publications and brands including Hindustan Times, Navbharat Times, Tata McGraw-Hill, Macmillan, RBS, Microsoft, Nestlé, PepsiCo, Siemens, Lease Plan, SIFY Ltd., Mumbai Samachar, Universal Journeys, and others.

Demonstrated exceptional versatility as a visual artist, adapting style and tone to meet the distinct creative briefs of media houses, educational publishers, and global consumer brands simultaneously.

raw_text:
Anirban Dey

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader

✉  romeldey@gmail.com

📞  +91 9811587800

📍  FU 31, Flat-D2, Tower-6, Sector-103, Chhattarpur, Gurgaon – 110074

🔗  linkedin.com/in/romeldey









PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

OEM Partner Management

Solution & Consultative Selling

Product Lifecycle Management

Government Body Engagement

BOQ / BOM & Techno-Commercial

Compliance & Certification

Nationwide Sales Support

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem



PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.



EDUCATION



2010

MBA – Information Systems

Sikkim Manipal University

2001

B.Sc. (Hons) – Economics, Statistics & Mathematics

University of Calcutta

1998

Higher Secondary (Science)

W.B.C.H.S.E.

1996

Madhyamik Pariksha

W.B.B.S.E.



PROFESSIONAL CERTIFICATIONS & QUALIFICATIONS



2006

ACNP – Advanced Computer Network Professional | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2005

CIC – Certificate in Computing | IGNOU

2004

CompTIA Network+ (N+) | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2003

Techno Month – Unix, NT & Linux | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2003

Certificate in Computer Hardware Maintenance | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2002

DOEACC 'A' Level – PC Software, Business Systems, System Analysis & MIS



LANGUAGES



English  |  Hindi  |  Bengali



PERSONAL DETAILS



Date of Birth:	25 November 1979

Family:	Parents, Wife & Two Daughters







I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

cv_suggestions: Add a 'Geographic Coverage & Markets' line to your summary or skills section explicitly stating any exposure to US- or UK-based OEM partners, global customers, or multinational accounts handled through AMD India — even indirect engagement with US/UK headquartered firms counts and directly addresses the top missing skill across matched jobs.

Create a dedicated 'Technical Specialization' section and list specific server and workstation platforms you have supported (e.g., AMD EPYC, Ryzen PRO, Threadripper), including chipset families, memory configurations, and thermal/power specs — matched roles for Sr. FAE and FAE Manager explicitly require server/workstation deep-dive expertise.

Add Cloud and Hybrid Architecture exposure to your skills and bullet points — if you have supported cloud-adjacent solutions (Azure Stack, AWS Outposts, private cloud on AMD platforms) or articulated on-prem-to-cloud migration paths in pre-sales engagements, call this out explicitly using terms like 'hybrid solution architecture' to match job description language.

Incorporate Data Management tooling familiarity into your AMD role bullets — if you used CRM platforms (Salesforce, SAP), asset tracking, or any pipeline/reporting tools during nationwide sales support or FAE activities, name the specific tools rather than describing the activity generically, as 'Data Management tooling' is a recurring gap signal.

Add a location line or relocation note — since 'Bangalore location' appears as a missing signal, explicitly state your current city and willingness to relocate to Bangalore (if applicable) in your resume header or summary, as many FAE and Pre-Sales roles in your match set are Bangalore-based and ATS filters often screen on location.

Address EDA software and PCB Design knowledge gaps by adding a brief 'Adjacent Technical Knowledge' subsection — even foundational familiarity with tools like Cadence, Synopsys, Altium, or KiCad, or experience supporting hardware engineers during product validation and bring-up at AMD, should be listed explicitly since EDA FAE roles are appearing in your match set and the absence of these terms is costing you relevance scores.

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader
