PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

OEM Partner Management

Solution & Consultative Selling

Product Lifecycle Management

Government Body Engagement

BOQ / BOM & Techno-Commercial

Compliance & Certification

Nationwide Sales Support

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem



PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.

cv_suggestions: Add Discord server management explicitly to your skills section and expand your Sploot or IXR Labs community role descriptions to mention any Discord-based engagement, moderation, channel structuring, or bot setup you handled — this is the single most frequently missing skill across matched jobs.

Include a dedicated 'Tools & Platforms' line that lists CRM tools you've used (e.g., HubSpot, Zoho, Notion, or even spreadsheet-based CRM workflows) since CRM experience is a recurring gap; if you lack formal CRM use, add a personal or freelance project where you managed leads or contacts systematically.

In your Sploot role (pet wellness brand), reframe your domain context explicitly — add a line like 'Operated in the health and wellness consumer space' to signal healthcare/wellness domain familiarity, which is a frequent requirement among matched community manager roles.

Add a short 'Availability & Work Style' note or a summary line such as 'Open to US PST shift hours and async-first collaboration' since the top-matched Hyderabad role explicitly requires US shift PST adaptability and this detail is invisible on your current resume.

Rewrite your community role bullet points at Sploot and IXR Labs to include customer advocacy and experience coordination language — for example, 'Built community feedback loops that informed product decisions' or 'Coordinated user advocacy initiatives to drive referrals and retention' — to address the missing customer advocacy programs and CX coordination skills.

Add a 'Projects' or 'Freelance' section if you have any agency-style or multi-client work, even informal ones, to address the agency/studio environment gap; alternatively, frame your dual-role experience across IXR Labs and Sploot as evidence of managing multiple brands and stakeholders simultaneously, which mimics agency context.

sections.content:
Senior Professional II / Manager | Feb 2017 – Present | Capgemini SE / Altran / Aricent Global | Gurgaon, India / Austin, US
- Worked closely with other product Engineers across the globe to deliver high quality work on time.
- Worked on Cloud Brokerage projects like IBMs MCNM and MCMP; developed e2e solutions in Golang and Python.
- Worked on IBM's Storage Virtualization and Management Solution such as Spectrum Connect / Embedded Vasa Provider.
- Worked on High availability systems like Power HA & TSAMP (TSA) and provided support on AIX and Linux; worked on multiple projects like IBM SDN, Spectrum Connect and BlueMix.
- Participated in discussions with Product Management and others on the feasibility of the proposed application and the time necessary to accomplish the work.
- Wrote detailed design and Architecture documents describing the approach to be taken and programming details.
- Coded application instructions into the local environment using C++, Golang, Python, Ansible, java and bash scripts.
- Fixed defects found. Repeated the testing cycles until the new application worked flawlessly.
- Reviewed Requirements, test plans and code to ensure compliance with coding standards and to ensure that defined requirements are met. Makes recommendations for improvements.

Lead Developer | Aug 2015 – Feb 2017 | Bestin-E | Delhi, India
- Worked on the server side coding for various requests coming from multiple clients.
- Worked on C++, PHP, J-Query and other libraries for developing a customized Content Management System for various client requirements.
- Designing, developing and enhancing end-to-end solutions for Content Management. Enabling Template based CMS which is scalable, for maximum reuse.
- Solutions for office communication, enabling both web and local application hosting using C++, XAMPP, Apache and Firebase.
- Have been an active contributor on Google Play and GitHub.
- Developed test modules for unit testing in combination with C++ and BASH scripts.
- WYSIWYG editor (With MathJax) to be used as an HTML editor.
- Interfaces for Android Video recorders which lets user synchronize multiple videos; based on java sockets.

Senior Developer (Integration) | May 2015 – Aug 2015 | OnDot | Bangalore, India
- Designing new frameworks for ongoing developments in and across teams in C++.
- Debug and Resolve issues which may relate software changes.
- Develop a robust framework for the R&D team to use over time.
- Develop NagiosPlug-in and mail alerts for System faults and early detection of problems.

Senior Developer | Jan 2014 – May 2015 | Cellos | Gurgaon & Bangalore, India
- Involved in ongoing analysis and process improvement of all source control and build processes.
- Worked on various development and test, stage and Production environments.
- Automation and Reporting System health.
- Strong IT experience in development and implementation of enterprise applications using Shell Scripts.
- Develop a robust framework for the services team to use over time.
- Develop Applications to parse system logs and create hourly/daily reports.
- Develop Alarms and mail alerts for System faults and early detection of problems.
- Have worked on application integration consisting of modules developed over different technologies.

Software Engineer | Aug 2011 – Jan 2014 | Aircom International | Gurgaon, India
- Automated build. Cron.
- Automated email notification on failures, environment monitoring.
- Trainings: Unix and Shell scripting, Java.
- Visual Studio for C++ development.

- Using Visual Lint for C++ to detect and report on code deficiencies.

- Created generic APIs and reuse code for each specific Parser.
- Visual alarms (like disk usage and Avg CPU load) with a Graphical BMP chart.

raw_text:
Anirban Dey

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader

✉  romeldey@gmail.com

📞  +91 9811587800

📍  FU 31, Flat-D2, Tower-6, Sector-103, Chhattarpur, Gurgaon – 110074

🔗  linkedin.com/in/romeldey









PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

OEM Partner Management

Solution & Consultative Selling

Product Lifecycle Management

Government Body Engagement

BOQ / BOM & Techno-Commercial

Compliance & Certification

Nationwide Sales Support

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem



PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.



EDUCATION



2010

MBA – Information Systems

Sikkim Manipal University

2001

B.Sc. (Hons) – Economics, Statistics & Mathematics

University of Calcutta

1998

Higher Secondary (Science)

W.B.C.H.S.E.

1996

Madhyamik Pariksha

W.B.B.S.E.



PROFESSIONAL CERTIFICATIONS & QUALIFICATIONS



2006

ACNP – Advanced Computer Network Professional | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2005

CIC – Certificate in Computing | IGNOU

2004

CompTIA Network+ (N+) | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2003

Techno Month – Unix, NT & Linux | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2003

Certificate in Computer Hardware Maintenance | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2002

DOEACC 'A' Level – PC Software, Business Systems, System Analysis & MIS



LANGUAGES



English  |  Hindi  |  Bengali



PERSONAL DETAILS



Date of Birth:	25 November 1979

Family:	Parents, Wife & Two Daughters







I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

cv_suggestions: Add a 'Cloud & SaaS Pre-Sales' bullet under your AMD role by highlighting any experience positioning cloud-connected AMD solutions, software licensing, or SaaS-based tools — even if peripheral — since this is the #1 missing skill across matched jobs like Pre-Sales Solutions Engineer and Technical Pre-Sales Consultant.

Create a dedicated 'Technical Skills' section that explicitly lists any exposure to software solution architecture, API integrations, or POC development (e.g., 'Developed and delivered technical POCs for OEM partners integrating AMD hardware with software stacks'), as matched roles consistently require software-side pre-sales depth beyond hardware.

Under your Pantel Technologies role, add a line referencing telecom infrastructure context — such as LTE/4G connectivity modules in tablets, government network compliance (BIS/DoT), or any 5G-ready product roadmap work — to bridge toward the Microwave/E-Band and Telecom Infrastructure skill gaps flagged in matched roles.

Reframe your 'Product Demos & Roadmaps' skill into a quantified achievement statement, such as 'Delivered 50+ technical product demos and solution roadmaps to enterprise and government stakeholders, resulting in [X] design wins or tender closures,' to align with the outcome-focused language expected in Pre-Sales Solutions Engineer and Head of Sales roles.

Add 'Software POC Development' and 'API Integration' to your skills section if you have any exposure — even through GeM Marketplace integrations, OEM software customization, or government portal workflows — and back it up with a brief bullet in your role descriptions to address the software architecture gap flagged across multiple matched jobs.

Pursue and prominently list a short online certification in Cloud Pre-Sales or Telecom fundamentals (e.g., AWS Cloud Practitioner, Cisco Introduction to Networks, or a 5G basics course on Coursera), and add it to an 'Education & Certifications' section to directly close the Cloud/SaaS and Telecom knowledge gaps that are limiting matches to roles like Technical Pre-Sales Manager - Microwave E-Band Solutions.

raw_text:
Profile

I am a Project Management professional with expertise in industry best practices such as Agile methodologies and SCRUM. Also serving as a Customer Experience Lead for AI products, with a strong emphasis on enhancing AI product development, generating insights out of AI and user conversation, and writing prompts in GenAI tool to get the designated tasks completed out of Assistant. 

I have comprehensive experience across the entire project lifecycle, including planning, requirements analysis and scoping, effort estimation, risk assessment, product demonstrations, automation, process optimization, user experience enhancement, and data analysis for actionable insights. I am known as a collaborative team player with a positive attitude and a strong ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 





Work Experience



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2023 – Present) Delivery ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Currently managing product BUILDER and Learner Pathways development and releases for the client PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), with responsibility for project/sprint planning, design and requirement document, test cases and technical architecture reviews, sprint demos, and technical architecture oversight. Leading the product for the third consecutive year. Collaborating with the PwC development and deployment team for successful integration of the BUILDER and Learner Pathways to their Plan and Learn platform.

Led the delivery of Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) version 6.0 for MetLife over the past 5 years, overseeing all phases from planning to execution.

Managing client and stakeholder relationships, including responsibilities such as product demonstrations, requirement analysis, scope and timeline planning, sprint creation and allocations, risk identification and mitigation, budget preparation, and feature release coordination. 

Planning and overseeing the entire project lifecycle, including progress monitoring, UX design review, user guide and test case validation, task and query management, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensuring on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to maintain quality and meet deadlines through innovative and efficient practices by providing detailed requirement explanations to technical, UI-UX, and QA teams, and by ensuring alignment and clarity across functions.

Leading project data presentations during internal governance calls to report progress and key metrics.

Serving as a member of the AI Customer Experience Group, contributing to user-focused enhancements for AI solutions. Actively engaged in prompt writing, contributing to the development of effective, high-quality AI-driven content.

Participating in AI product development initiatives for global clients such as The Writing Revolution, Coca-Cola, Qatar Airways, and Kyndryl. 

Involved in AI based insights generation for conversational data. Involved in the management of NAIRA chatbot which is part of our intranet platform iniitian portal. 

Was involved in the successful end-to-end development lifecycle of Boehringer Ingelheim. Here we have used our own product CXP and have evolved it to meet the requirement. 



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2021 – July 2023) Sr. Project ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Managed the Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) for MetLife, overseeing version 5.0 and driving the transition to version 6.0. 

Managed the CXP platform for approximately 20 clients, including high-profile names like Intel, Biogen, BMS, Rolls Royce, Boeing, Bank of America, Getinge, MYOB, Anglo American, Qatar Airways, Boehringer Ingelheim and more.

Client and Stakeholder Management: Lead product demonstrations, conduct requirements analysis, manage scope and timeline planning, drive process optimization, create sprints, allocate tasks, identify and mitigate risks, oversee budget management, and coordinate feature releases. 

Planned and monitored the entire project, ensuring seamless alignment across all phases, including UX design reviews, user guide validation, test case analysis, task management, query resolution, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensured on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to meet deadlines while maintaining high quality, adhering to requirements, and utilizing innovative solutions for efficient execution. 

Presented project data during governance calls, delivering clear updates and key metrics on project progress.

Collaborated with internal teams and departments to collect feedback, address queries, and proactively enhance user experience and customer satisfaction.

Engaged in data analytics, extracting actionable insights to drive product improvements and optimize performance.



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2+ years: Jan 2019 – July 2021) Technical SpecialistLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Led requirement analysis, assessed technical feasibility, and established the product flow for various projects. 

Served as the Technical Project Manager for Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) (versions 2.0, 3.0, 4.0), UX Design, Virtual Induction/Onboarding, Data Formation for Analytics, and Micro Learning Authoring Platform—NIIT’s core product. MetLife was the primary client for these platforms.

Successfully delivered the Knowledge Management System (KMS) UI and execution, a platform containing various real estate resources integrated into e-Learning courses. This system is primarily used by RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Demonstrated strong project management capabilities, including end-to-end planning, effective communication with cross-functional teams, and the formation of development teams to execute projects successfully.



Client Communication: 

Managed client and stakeholder relationships, including conducting product demonstrations, setting up kick-off calls, understanding assignment scopes, documenting Minutes of Meetings (MoM), and allocating tasks.



Technical support, Quality Review & Mentoring: 

Contributed to UX design, ensuring the interface was user-friendly and clutter-free. Primarily used PowerPoint and Photoshop to ideate design and navigation flow.

Conducted product reviews, providing feedback to team members on quality improvement, meeting standards, reducing rework, and boosting productivity.

Provided technical guidance to project team members to help them achieve project-related objectives.

Actively mentored team members and conducted Technical Excellence training across teams and business units within NIIT.



NIIT Ltd, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR) 					 (8.8 years: April’10 – Dec 2018)

Technical Specialist Learning Content Technology, CLG (Corporate Learning Group)

Technical Project Management Responsibilities:

Developed the architecture for e-Learning using Lectora'11, which is now actively used in the production of over 200 courses for RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Created the architecture and POC for an automation tool (Bullet) that extracts content from MS Word and integrates it into Lectora's published package, also structuring courses as specified in MS Word. This tool reduced course production time by 60% and helped NIIT save costs equivalent to approximately 10 Lectora licenses. 

Designed the UX architecture for the Media Assets Library (PIXO), optimizing content management and user experience. 

Developed an HTML5-based e-Learning engine/framework, which was used to produce over 40 courses and assessments for IQVIA. Was also responsible for overseeing project execution and management.

Created various e-Learning frameworks for high-profile clients such as IQVIA, Philips, SAP, Rio Tinto, MetLife, Lavoro, and ITT. Utilized tools such as Articulate Storyline, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Articulate Presenter, Adobe Captivate, and Lectora.

Gained hands-on experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS) such as SumTotal, SuccessFactors, Cornerstone, Saba, MTS, and Moodle.  

Client Management & Ways of working:

Collaborated with clients such as IQVIA, SAP, Rio Tinto, and RECO to provide technical solutions and oversee project execution.

Took responsibility for the preparation and presentation of the Management Operating Review (MOR) deck to senior management. 

Organized and conducted technical training sessions and team meetings to ensure knowledge sharing and project alignment.







Melco, United States					        	(8 months: Aug 2009 – Mar 2010)

Technical ConsultantSupported remotely (Worked from Home) 

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to an e-commerce project utilizing Flash ActionScript 2.0, ASP.NET, and SQL Server technologies. The project involved the development of the online designer tool. 





XentaQsys Technologies Pvt. Ltd., Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)  (10 months: Jun 2008 – Mar 2009)

Project/Team Lead 

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on a Content Management System (FLOEDIT) for Deutsche Telekom, a Germany-based client, focused on managing eLearning content. The system allowed the client to publish content in three formats: Flash, HTML, and PDF. 

Visited Germany for 3 months to conduct requirement analysis and support the development of the project.





R systems International Ltd., Noida			      	(2.2 years: Apr 2006 – May 2008)

Software Engineer

Technical Responsibilities:

Primarily worked on US based various clients using Adobe Flash, HTML, CSS, JavaScript.





GE Content Solution (GENPACT)., Gurgaon		      	(6 months: Sep 2005 – Feb 2006)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on various e-learning projects, developing interactive tasks for systems like Lean, Oracle Advanced Planning & Scheduling, Oracle Fixed Assets, Oracle Process Manufacturing, Oracle Discrete Manufacturing, cBOM Editor, SWB Sales Compensation, and the GE Healthcare ROI Tool.





Magic Software Pvt. Ltd., Noida				      	(4 months: May 2005 – Aug 2005)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to e-learning projects by developing interactive tasks for Negotiating Women, Skillsoft, Daydream, Toyota Car Competition, and Clean Power with Amaze.

11.title: Profile
11.content:
I am a Project Management professional with expertise in industry best practices such as Agile methodologies and SCRUM. Also serving as a Customer Experience Lead for AI products, with a strong emphasis on enhancing AI product development, generating insights out of AI and user conversation, and writing prompts in GenAI tool to get the designated tasks completed out of Assistant. 

I have comprehensive experience across the entire project lifecycle, including planning, requirements analysis and scoping, effort estimation, risk assessment, product demonstrations, automation, process optimization, user experience enhancement, and data analysis for actionable insights. I am known as a collaborative team player with a positive attitude and a strong ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams.

cv_suggestions: Add a dedicated 'Core Competencies' or 'Skills' section that explicitly lists 'Solution Architecture' and 'Product Management' — these are the top missing signals recruiters scan for in Senior Programme Manager and Learning Product Manager roles.

Quantify any programme or curriculum ownership you have held by adding budget figures and team sizes (e.g., 'Managed a £2M programme budget across 3 geographies'), directly addressing the P&L ownership and large-scale multi-geography leadership gaps employers are flagging.

Include a bullet point under each relevant role that describes university, curriculum co-design, or institutional partnership work — for example, 'Co-designed curriculum with [University/Partner] to align content with industry outcomes' — to close the University/curriculum co-design gap critical for EdTech Product roles.

Add explicit methodology labels to past project descriptions, noting both Agile and Waterfall delivery experience (e.g., 'Delivered ERP rollout using Waterfall methodology across 4 market regions'), since matched roles like Delivery Manager - ERP and LMS Project Manager specifically screen for Waterfall fluency.

Create a 'Learner Outcomes & Market Research' highlight either in a summary or as a standalone bullet — referencing tools or frameworks used for competitive analysis, learner satisfaction measurement, or market relevance tracking — to address the Market Research and Outcomes Measurement skills gap.

If you hold any formal product management credentials (AIPMM, Pragmatic Institute, or similar), list them prominently under Education or Certifications; if not, enroll in a recognised short course (e.g., Coursera's Google PM Certificate) and add it with an 'In Progress' label to immediately signal commitment to the Formal Product Management credential gap.

parsed_data.summary: Creative and result-driven Performance Marketer & Community Growth Lead with a proven ability to grow engaged communities, boost brand presence, and drive organic audience growth. Skilled in content creation, digital engagement, and event execution.

bullets: B2B & D2C market research - India / USA / Canada / UK
Product GTM Strategy - Lead generation, Performance Marketing, Community Development
Content Strategy and Management
Quality Analysis

experience.title: Community/Marketing Manager
bullets: Increased active user cohort by 200% through targeted engagement and personalized community initiatives.
Captured 111% increase in sales within the engaged cohort by aligning content, events, and offers with user behavior.
Boosted social media reach by 215% in just 2 weeks through strategic content creation and community-led campaigns.
Planned and executed online/offline events that strengthened brand loyalty and participation.

experience.title: Marketing Lead
bullets: Developed Industry aligned user centric curriculum in multiple niches to increase engagement.
Curated more than 50 keyword and trend specific campaigns contributing to ON and OFF page SEO.
Captured 56% ROAS growth via Meta and Google Ads.
3 Step Funnel creation to convert existing and new users into paying clients.

experience.title: Community Developer & Manager
bullets: Developed a community of over 1,200 paying customers in one month.
Developed a community from scratch of over 2000+ people in a span of 1.2 months.
Conceptualized and executed content for organic marketing and social media outreach.

experience.title: Coach
bullets: Managed a community of over 100,000 members.
Improved Client interaction by over 34.43%.
Managed over 500 Clients, earning more than 350 five-star reviews.
More than 100 Video testimonials received.
Curated and hosted multiple online and offline events.
Onboarded sponsors and led recurring events to boost social media growth.

cv_suggestions: Add Discord server management explicitly to your skills and describe specific Discord community initiatives at IXR Labs or Sploot (e.g., 'Built and moderated a Discord server of X members, managing channels, bots, and engagement workflows') — Discord appears as the #1 missing skill across matched Community Manager roles.

Add a dedicated 'Tools & Platforms' section that explicitly lists WhatsApp Communities/Groups and Discord alongside your existing tools, and mention any WhatsApp broadcast or group management experience from Sploot or IXR Labs to address the WhatsApp community management gap.

Reframe your IXR Labs and Sploot bullet points to include quantified ownership metrics (e.g., 'Managed end-to-end community lifecycle for 5,000+ members across platforms') to partially offset the 5–10 years experience gap by demonstrating scope and impact rather than tenure.

Add a 'Project & Program Management' subsection or tag within your roles highlighting any cross-functional campaigns you led — mention tools like Notion, Asana, or Trello and describe coordinating between product, content, and design teams to address the project/program management domain gap.

Include a brief 'Availability & Work Setup' line or note in your resume header (e.g., 'Open to US PST shift hours / Remote') since the highest-paying matched role explicitly requires US PST availability and candidates who don't signal this are filtered out early.

Incorporate editorial planning language into your Content Strategy bullet points — use phrases like 'developed monthly editorial calendars,' 'managed content pipelines across owned channels,' and 'coordinated content briefs with writers' to address the editorial planning gap and appeal to roles requiring structured content governance.

Partnered with OEMs (e.g., HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell etc.) and 'Make in India' entities for product positioning and sales strategies.
Managed GeM marketplace positioning and OEM coordination to maximize visibility and compliance.
Built strong relationships with government bodies (GeM, MeitY, MAIT, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC etc.) to influence procurement.
Delivered persuasive product demos and technical consultations to accelerate deal closures.
Led proposal development and RFP submissions, securing tender wins through competitive strategies.

experience.title: Product Manager
bullets: Directed product lifecycle management from strategic planning to tactical execution.
Managed tender desk operations, ensuring compliance and winning commercial strategies.
Conducted market research and customer visits to shape product strategy and go-to-market plans.
Collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand market reach.
Oversaw certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux) to strengthen sales credibility.
Delivered system demonstrations and addressed technical queries to build customer trust.

experience.title: Product Manager
bullets: Finalized product SKUs and benchmarking to align offerings with customer needs.
Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement company-wide sales and positioning initiatives.
Expanded partner relationships to strengthen sales channels and market penetration.
Supported sustainability initiatives (recycling, e-waste) to enhance brand reputation.

experience.title: Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations
bullets: Secured key product certifications (BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC) to boost market credibility.
Positioned 'Chirag' brand as a Greenpeace-listed organization, enhancing customer confidence.
Managed DGSnD rate contracts and tenders, ensuring competitive participation.
Delivered nationwide product demos and inspections to build trust with government and corporate clients.
Directed regional support services across multiple states, reinforcing customer loyalty.

experience.title: Executive – Lab Admin & Hardware Support
bullets: Oversaw lab administration and hardware support across schools, ensuring customer satisfaction.
Delivered training and served as faculty, strengthening communication and presentation skills.

certifications: ACNP (Advanced Computer Network Professional) - Indian Institute of Hardware Technology (2006)
CIC (Certificate in Computing), IGNOU (2005)
CompTIA N+ Networking, Indian Institute of Hardware Technology (2004)
Techno Month (Unix, NT & Linux), CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise) (2003)
Certificate in Computer Hardware Maintenance, CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise) (2003)
DOEACC 'A' Level (PC Software, Business Systems, System Analysis & MIS) (2002)
cv_suggestions: Add a 'Key Accounts Management' or 'Strategic Account Management' label explicitly in your experience section — since roles at AMD and PENTA likely involved managing large OEM/government accounts, reframe bullet points to use language like 'managed key accounts across [region]' to close the title/experience gap flagged by recruiters.

Create a dedicated 'Security & Surveillance Technology' or 'Emerging Tech Domains' section or skills cluster that includes any exposure to video analytics, endpoint security, or cybersecurity products — even if indirect (e.g., AMD processors used in surveillance hardware, or security-adjacent product certifications from your Product Manager role at PENTA).

Explicitly call out North India or specific state/region coverage in your AMD FAE role — if your territory included Delhi NCR, UP, Rajasthan, or other North/East India markets, name those states directly in your role description to match 'North & East India' and 'Kochi/Coimbatore market familiarity' requirements.

Add a SaaS or platform sales dimension to your Go-to-Market Planning and Product Lifecycle Management skills — if you managed software-bundled hardware SKUs or subscription-based product lines at PENTA or AMD, reframe those bullets to highlight 'platform/solution selling' or 'hardware+software bundled GTM' to address the SaaS/Platform Sales gap.

Introduce P&L or revenue ownership language into your experience bullets — replace vague phrases with quantified statements like 'managed product portfolio contributing ₹X Cr in annual revenue' or 'owned GTM execution for [product line] across [region]' to signal Regional P&L ownership capability sought by Regional Sales Manager roles.

Add a 'Defence & Government Sector' subsection under your Government Procurement and GeM Marketplace Management skills, explicitly naming any defence PSUs, MoD-affiliated tenders, or defence-adjacent government clients you engaged with at AMD or PENTA, directly addressing the 'Defence sector network' gap flagged across matched jobs.

raw_text:
Profile

I am a Project Management professional with expertise in industry best practices such as Agile methodologies and SCRUM. Also serving as a Customer Experience Lead for AI products, with a strong emphasis on enhancing AI product development, generating insights out of AI and user conversation, and writing prompts in GenAI tool to get the designated tasks completed out of Assistant. 

I have comprehensive experience across the entire project lifecycle, including planning, requirements analysis and scoping, effort estimation, risk assessment, product demonstrations, automation, process optimization, user experience enhancement, and data analysis for actionable insights. I am known as a collaborative team player with a positive attitude and a strong ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 





Work Experience



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2023 – Present) Delivery ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Currently managing product BUILDER and Learner Pathways development and releases for the client PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), with responsibility for project/sprint planning, design and requirement document, test cases and technical architecture reviews, sprint demos, and technical architecture oversight. Leading the product for the third consecutive year. Collaborating with the PwC development and deployment team for successful integration of the BUILDER and Learner Pathways to their Plan and Learn platform.

Led the delivery of Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) version 6.0 for MetLife over the past 5 years, overseeing all phases from planning to execution.

Managing client and stakeholder relationships, including responsibilities such as product demonstrations, requirement analysis, scope and timeline planning, sprint creation and allocations, risk identification and mitigation, budget preparation, and feature release coordination. 

Planning and overseeing the entire project lifecycle, including progress monitoring, UX design review, user guide and test case validation, task and query management, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensuring on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to maintain quality and meet deadlines through innovative and efficient practices by providing detailed requirement explanations to technical, UI-UX, and QA teams, and by ensuring alignment and clarity across functions.

Leading project data presentations during internal governance calls to report progress and key metrics.

Serving as a member of the AI Customer Experience Group, contributing to user-focused enhancements for AI solutions. Actively engaged in prompt writing, contributing to the development of effective, high-quality AI-driven content.

Participating in AI product development initiatives for global clients such as The Writing Revolution, Coca-Cola, Qatar Airways, and Kyndryl. 

Involved in AI based insights generation for conversational data. Involved in the management of NAIRA chatbot which is part of our intranet platform iniitian portal. 

Was involved in the successful end-to-end development lifecycle of Boehringer Ingelheim. Here we have used our own product CXP and have evolved it to meet the requirement. 



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2021 – July 2023) Sr. Project ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Managed the Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) for MetLife, overseeing version 5.0 and driving the transition to version 6.0. 

Managed the CXP platform for approximately 20 clients, including high-profile names like Intel, Biogen, BMS, Rolls Royce, Boeing, Bank of America, Getinge, MYOB, Anglo American, Qatar Airways, Boehringer Ingelheim and more.

Client and Stakeholder Management: Lead product demonstrations, conduct requirements analysis, manage scope and timeline planning, drive process optimization, create sprints, allocate tasks, identify and mitigate risks, oversee budget management, and coordinate feature releases. 

Planned and monitored the entire project, ensuring seamless alignment across all phases, including UX design reviews, user guide validation, test case analysis, task management, query resolution, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensured on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to meet deadlines while maintaining high quality, adhering to requirements, and utilizing innovative solutions for efficient execution. 

Presented project data during governance calls, delivering clear updates and key metrics on project progress.

Collaborated with internal teams and departments to collect feedback, address queries, and proactively enhance user experience and customer satisfaction.

Engaged in data analytics, extracting actionable insights to drive product improvements and optimize performance.



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2+ years: Jan 2019 – July 2021) Technical SpecialistLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Led requirement analysis, assessed technical feasibility, and established the product flow for various projects. 

Served as the Technical Project Manager for Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) (versions 2.0, 3.0, 4.0), UX Design, Virtual Induction/Onboarding, Data Formation for Analytics, and Micro Learning Authoring Platform—NIIT’s core product. MetLife was the primary client for these platforms.

Successfully delivered the Knowledge Management System (KMS) UI and execution, a platform containing various real estate resources integrated into e-Learning courses. This system is primarily used by RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Demonstrated strong project management capabilities, including end-to-end planning, effective communication with cross-functional teams, and the formation of development teams to execute projects successfully.



Client Communication: 

Managed client and stakeholder relationships, including conducting product demonstrations, setting up kick-off calls, understanding assignment scopes, documenting Minutes of Meetings (MoM), and allocating tasks.



Technical support, Quality Review & Mentoring: 

Contributed to UX design, ensuring the interface was user-friendly and clutter-free. Primarily used PowerPoint and Photoshop to ideate design and navigation flow.

Conducted product reviews, providing feedback to team members on quality improvement, meeting standards, reducing rework, and boosting productivity.

Provided technical guidance to project team members to help them achieve project-related objectives.

Actively mentored team members and conducted Technical Excellence training across teams and business units within NIIT.



NIIT Ltd, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR) 					 (8.8 years: April’10 – Dec 2018)

Technical Specialist Learning Content Technology, CLG (Corporate Learning Group)

Technical Project Management Responsibilities:

Developed the architecture for e-Learning using Lectora'11, which is now actively used in the production of over 200 courses for RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Created the architecture and POC for an automation tool (Bullet) that extracts content from MS Word and integrates it into Lectora's published package, also structuring courses as specified in MS Word. This tool reduced course production time by 60% and helped NIIT save costs equivalent to approximately 10 Lectora licenses. 

Designed the UX architecture for the Media Assets Library (PIXO), optimizing content management and user experience. 

Developed an HTML5-based e-Learning engine/framework, which was used to produce over 40 courses and assessments for IQVIA. Was also responsible for overseeing project execution and management.

Created various e-Learning frameworks for high-profile clients such as IQVIA, Philips, SAP, Rio Tinto, MetLife, Lavoro, and ITT. Utilized tools such as Articulate Storyline, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Articulate Presenter, Adobe Captivate, and Lectora.

Gained hands-on experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS) such as SumTotal, SuccessFactors, Cornerstone, Saba, MTS, and Moodle.  

Client Management & Ways of working:

Collaborated with clients such as IQVIA, SAP, Rio Tinto, and RECO to provide technical solutions and oversee project execution.

Took responsibility for the preparation and presentation of the Management Operating Review (MOR) deck to senior management. 

Organized and conducted technical training sessions and team meetings to ensure knowledge sharing and project alignment.







Melco, United States					        	(8 months: Aug 2009 – Mar 2010)

Technical ConsultantSupported remotely (Worked from Home) 

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to an e-commerce project utilizing Flash ActionScript 2.0, ASP.NET, and SQL Server technologies. The project involved the development of the online designer tool. 





XentaQsys Technologies Pvt. Ltd., Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)  (10 months: Jun 2008 – Mar 2009)

Project/Team Lead 

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on a Content Management System (FLOEDIT) for Deutsche Telekom, a Germany-based client, focused on managing eLearning content. The system allowed the client to publish content in three formats: Flash, HTML, and PDF. 

Visited Germany for 3 months to conduct requirement analysis and support the development of the project.





R systems International Ltd., Noida			      	(2.2 years: Apr 2006 – May 2008)

Software Engineer

Technical Responsibilities:

Primarily worked on US based various clients using Adobe Flash, HTML, CSS, JavaScript.





GE Content Solution (GENPACT)., Gurgaon		      	(6 months: Sep 2005 – Feb 2006)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on various e-learning projects, developing interactive tasks for systems like Lean, Oracle Advanced Planning & Scheduling, Oracle Fixed Assets, Oracle Process Manufacturing, Oracle Discrete Manufacturing, cBOM Editor, SWB Sales Compensation, and the GE Healthcare ROI Tool.





Magic Software Pvt. Ltd., Noida				      	(4 months: May 2005 – Aug 2005)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to e-learning projects by developing interactive tasks for Negotiating Women, Skillsoft, Daydream, Toyota Car Competition, and Clean Power with Amaze.





Academics

MCA – Shobhit University							

BCA – Patna University

cv_suggestions: Explicitly add 'Waterfall Methodology' alongside your existing Agile/SCRUM skills in your skills section, and call out hybrid delivery models in your role descriptions to signal fluency across both frameworks — many Delivery Manager and Project Manager postings require demonstrated experience with both.

Add a dedicated bullet under each role highlighting SLA management, such as 'Defined, monitored, and reported against SLAs for learning technology delivery engagements, maintaining X% on-time delivery,' since SLA management documentation appears as one of the most frequent gaps across your matched jobs.

Since matched roles include 'Delivery Manager | Offshore | India' and 'Scrum Master | Offshore | India,' explicitly call out multi-geography or offshore delivery experience in your NIIT role descriptions — for example, 'Led offshore delivery teams across X locations, coordinating across time zones to ensure on-schedule project execution.'

Add MS Project to your skills section and reference it in context within your role bullets (e.g., 'Utilized MS Project and Agile tools to manage sprint planning, effort estimation, and resource allocation'), as it is a recurring gap and a standard expectation for Delivery Manager and Project Manager roles.

If you hold or are pursuing PMP certification, list it prominently in a Certifications section; if not, consider adding a line such as 'PMP Certification – In Progress (PMI)' to directly address the most visible credentialing gap across matched roles and strengthen your candidacy for formal PM titles.

Since your background includes learning technology delivery at NIIT, add specific references to media/animation asset management, publishing platform handoffs, or editorial content production workflows if applicable — for example, 'Oversaw end-to-end delivery of eLearning content including coordination of animation assets, authoring tool outputs, and LMS publishing handoffs' — to close the content production skill gap flagged across matched jobs.

raw_text:
Anirban Dey

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader

✉  romeldey@gmail.com

📞  +91 9811587800

📍  FU 31, Flat-D2, Tower-6, Sector-103, Chhattarpur, Gurgaon – 110074

🔗  linkedin.com/in/romeldey









PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. cv_suggestions: Add a 'Technical Domains' or 'Solutions Expertise' section that explicitly calls out any exposure to networking infrastructure, SaaS platforms, or cybersecurity solutions (e.g., endpoint security, cloud security posture) — even if gained through AMD or government tender evaluations — to directly address the most frequent skill gap across matched Pre-Sales and Solutions Engineer roles.

Quantify and reframe your AMD FAE role to highlight any team coordination or cross-functional leadership (e.g., 'Led pre-sales support across 5 regional teams' or 'Coordinated with 3 OEM partners to deliver X deals'), since 'Formal sales team leadership' is a recurring gap and your current bullet points likely undersell this management dimension needed for Head of Sales and Technical Pre-Sales Manager titles.

Add a dedicated line or project callout under Pantel Technologies referencing any revenue targets, deal sizes, or budget ownership (e.g., 'Managed pre-sales pipeline worth ₹X Cr' or 'Contributed to P&L for government vertical'), since P&L ownership is a top missing skill and your BOQ/BOM and Techno-Commercial Bidding experience strongly implies commercial accountability that should be made explicit.

Include a certifications section and immediately pursue at least one vendor-neutral or domain-specific credential such as CompTIA Security+, AWS Cloud Practitioner, or Cisco's CCNA to address the dual gaps of 'Formal solution architecture certifications' and 'Specific cybersecurity or SaaS product knowledge' — listing 'in progress' certifications is acceptable and signals active upskilling to hiring managers.

Incorporate telecom and 5G-adjacent terminology into your existing system integration and OEM partner management bullets — for example, reference any government projects involving telecom infrastructure, backhaul solutions, or connectivity mandates under Make in India — to reduce the keyword gap for the Technical Pre-Sales Manager - Microwave/E-Band Solutions and telecom infrastructure roles you are matching to.

Create a 'Key Wins / Solution Highlights' section with 2-3 deal-level case studies in the format 'Problem → Solution Architected → Outcome' to demonstrate Automation & Digital Solutions Architecture and End-point Services depth, pulling from your AMD demos, government RFP wins, or Pantel product deployments to make your consultative selling experience tangible and role-specific.

cv_suggestions: Add a dedicated 'Enterprise & Server Technologies' subsection under skills or within your AMD role, explicitly listing server/workstation platforms (e.g., EPYC, Threadripper Pro, Radeon Pro), hypervisors (VMware, Hyper-V), and any data center or HPC exposure to address the server/workstation technical depth gap.

Incorporate SaaS and subscription revenue model language directly into your Product Manager bullet points at Pantel Technologies — for example, reframe any software bundling, licensing, or recurring revenue work as 'subscription-based product lifecycle management' or 'SaaS-adjacent go-to-market execution.'

Add a 'Regional Coverage' line or geographic scope indicator in your AMD FAE role (e.g., 'Managed accounts across North, West, and South India including Bangalore-based OEM and government clients') to signal pan-India and specifically South India coverage to Bangalore-headquartered employers.

Create a quantified 'Quota & Revenue Impact' bullet under your AMD or Pantel roles that explicitly states direct sales targets met or exceeded (e.g., 'Supported ₹X Cr in quota-carrying pipeline as primary technical resource'), since Quota-Carrying Direct Sales is a top missing skill across matched roles.

Add EDA, simulation, or semiconductor design workflow familiarity to your skills section if you have any exposure — even indirect (e.g., supporting AMD's silicon/GPU customers, or tools like MATLAB, Cadence, or Ansys used in customer environments) — and expand on this in a relevant AMD FAE bullet to close the EDA/Semiconductor gap.

Include a Cloud Networking or SD-WAN context line in your technical skills (e.g., 'Familiar with cloud-connected deployment architectures including AWS/Azure integration and SD-WAN overlays') and reference any cloud-adjacent pre-sales or POC work from your AMD role to address the Cloud Networking/SD-WAN domain knowledge gap.

parsed_data.name: Pratham Oberoi
parsed_data.summary: Creative and result-driven Performance Marketer & Community Growth Lead with a proven ability to grow engaged communities, boost brand presence, and drive organic audience growth. Skilled in content creation, digital engagement, and event execution.

bullets: B2B & D2C market research - India / USA / Canada / UK
Product GTM Strategy - Lead generation, Performance Marketing, Community Development
Content Strategy and Management
Quality Analysis

experience.title: Community/Marketing Manager
bullets: Increased active user cohort by 200% through targeted engagement and personalized community initiatives.
Captured 111% increase in sales within the engaged cohort by aligning content, events, and offers with user behavior.
Boosted social media reach by 215% in just 2 weeks through strategic content creation and community-led campaigns.
Planned and executed online/offline events that strengthened brand loyalty and participation.

experience.title: Marketing Lead
bullets: Developed Industry aligned user centric curriculum in multiple niches to increase engagement.
Curated more than 50 keyword and trend specific campaigns contributing to ON and OFF page SEO.
Captured 56% ROAS growth via Meta and Google Ads.
3 Step Funnel creation to convert existing and new users into paying clients.

experience.title: Community Developer & Manager
bullets: Developed a community of over 1,200 paying customers in one month.
Developed a community from scratch of over 2000+ people in a span of 1.2 months.
Conceptualized and executed content for organic marketing and social media outreach.

experience.title: Coach
bullets: Managed a community of over 100,000 members.
Improved Client interaction by over 34.43%.
Managed over 500 Clients, earning more than 350 five-star reviews.
More than 100 Video testimonials received.
Curated and hosted multiple online and offline events.
Onboarded sponsors and led recurring events to boost social media growth.

cv_suggestions: Add a 'Available for US PST/EST shifts' line in your resume header or summary section, since multiple matched roles (including the Hyderabad Digital Marketing & Community Growth Manager role) explicitly require US shift availability — this single line can unlock several filtered-out opportunities.

Create a dedicated 'CRM & Customer Workflows' bullet under your Sploot or IXR Labs roles, explicitly naming tools like HubSpot, Zoho, or Freshdesk if used, and describing how you managed member/customer lifecycles — CRM management and customer support workflows are the most frequent hard-skill gaps across your matched jobs.

Add a 'Community Platforms & Channels' skills subsection that explicitly lists WhatsApp group management, Discord, Slack, or Telegram community moderation experience, since WhatsApp group management and community platform specifics are recurring gaps and Community Manager roles expect these to be explicitly stated.

Quantify your sales and revenue collaboration in your Sploot role by adding a bullet like 'Collaborated with sales team to convert X community leads into paying customers, contributing to Y% revenue growth' — sales collaboration experience is a flagged gap and B2C/D2C community roles heavily weigh community-to-revenue attribution.

Add a brief domain context line to your Sploot experience (pet health/wellness platform) such as 'Operated within a health and wellness consumer brand context' — health/wellness domain knowledge is a listed gap, and Sploot's pet care vertical is directly transferable to that domain, but it's not currently visible to recruiters.

Reframe your total experience narrative by grouping freelance, contract, or project-based marketing work alongside your full-time roles to close the '5+ years experience' gap — add a 'Freelance/Consulting' entry with specific clients or projects where you applied SEO, Meta Ads, or GTM strategy, since experience depth is the single most frequent disqualifier across matched roles.

Anirban Dey

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader

✉  romeldey@gmail.com

📞  +91 9811587800

📍  FU 31, Flat-D2, Tower-6, Sector-103, Chhattarpur, Gurgaon – 110074

🔗  linkedin.com/in/romeldey









PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

OEM Partner Management

Solution & Consultative Selling

Product Lifecycle Management

Government Body Engagement

BOQ / BOM & Techno-Commercial

Compliance & Certification

Nationwide Sales Support

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem



PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.



EDUCATION



2010

English  |  Hindi  |  Bengali

SUMMARY
Results-driven Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader with 25+ years of progressive experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, enterprise solution selling, and product lifecycle management. (10 years), spearheading OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell while managing strategic positioning on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal to maximise tender win rates across government and enterprise segments. Recognised for deep stakeholder engagement with apex government bodies — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — and a consistent track record of converting complex technical consultations into high-value RFP and tender victories across pan-India geographies. A strategic, ATS-optimised professional combining consultative selling, BOQ/BOM expertise, compliance management, and product roadmap delivery to accelerate revenue pipelines and build enduring national-level client relationships.

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.

"Make in India" Ecosystem

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.

cv_suggestions: Add a 'P&L Ownership' bullet under your AMD India or Pantel roles by quantifying revenue impact — e.g., 'Managed pre-sales pipeline contributing ₹X Cr in annual revenue' or 'Owned product P&L of ₹X Cr, driving X% margin improvement' to directly address the most frequently missing skill across matched jobs.

Create a 'Telecom & RF Domain Exposure' section or add context to existing bullets referencing any microwave, E-Band, or wireless backhaul solutions you supported at AMD or Pantel — even indirect exposure to networking hardware, last-mile connectivity, or 5G-adjacent infrastructure projects will help bridge the telecom infrastructure gap.

Add a 'Technical Competencies' or 'Domain Knowledge' section that explicitly lists Cloud/SaaS Architecture, Solution Architecture, and any specific platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP, or SD-WAN tools) you have worked with during pre-sales demos or BOQ/BOM preparation, as software pre-sales experience and solution architecture design are missing in nearly all matched roles.

Under your AMD India FAE/Field Support Manager role, reframe existing demo and roadmap experience as 'Solution Architecture Design' — specifically mention instances where you designed end-to-end technical solutions, created network or system architecture diagrams, or led proof-of-concept engagements for enterprise or government clients.

For roles targeting Geospatial Intelligence (Manager – Geospatial Intelligence Sales & Pre-Sales), add a tailored resume variant that connects your Government Body Engagement, GeM Marketplace, and Make in India Ecosystem skills to GIS/satellite imagery use cases in defense, smart cities, or infrastructure — and list any familiarity with platforms like ESRI ArcGIS, QGIS, or ISRO-linked projects even at a conceptual level.

Strengthen your MBA in Information Systems credential by adding relevant certifications that close skill gaps — prioritize AWS Cloud Practitioner or Google Cloud Digital Leader for Cloud/SaaS credibility, or a Telecom/5G fundamentals course (e.g., Coursera's 5G offerings or Ericsson Academy) to signal domain upskilling directly aligned to the top missing skills.

An artist with extensive experience in Visual Design. Creative experience in visualization and development of E-learning course, Graphic design, Interface design, Flash animation, Character Design, Illustration, Infographics, Icons, cartoons, caricatures etc.

 11 - Dec

 13 - Dec
Graphic Designer, Individual Contractor

Also independently handled graphic development of WBT projects, html-based emailers and newsletters.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.

- Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.
- Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

- Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

- Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.
- Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.
- Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.
- Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.

- Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.
