cv_suggestions: Add a dedicated 'Technical Tools & Platforms' section explicitly listing any EDA or schematic tools you've touched (even basic exposure to Altium, KiCad, or OrCAD), since PCB Design and EDA software familiarity appear as the top missing skills across matched FAE roles.

Under your AMD India role, add bullet points describing any server, workstation, or embedded architecture support you provided — mention specific processor families (EPYC, Ryzen Pro, Threadripper) and use-case environments (datacenter, edge, HPC) to address the server/workstation deep architecture gap.

Create a 'Domain Exposure' or 'Industry Verticals' section that acknowledges adjacent hardware domains you've supported — if you've worked with power systems, industrial electronics, or energy clients through BOQ/BOM work, call that out explicitly to reduce the Solar/Power Electronics skills gap visible to hiring managers.

Add a 'Geographic Coverage' line in your summary or AMD role explicitly naming Bangalore and other major metros where you provided field support or account management, since Bangalore-based account relationships are flagged as a location-specific gap for these matched roles.

Incorporate data management and tools experience into your Product Manager bullets at Pantel — if you used Excel, SQL, Power BI, or any PLM/CRM platform for lifecycle or sales data, name those tools explicitly, as 'Data Management tools experience' is a recurring gap across matched job descriptions.

Rewrite your resume summary to lead with your FAE identity rather than sales — open with a line like 'Field Applications Engineer with X years supporting hardware/silicon solutions across government and commercial accounts' to better pattern-match the Sr. FAE and Senior FAE titles dominating your matched job list.

Profile

An artist with extensive experience in Visual Design. Creative experience in visualization and development of E-learning course, Graphic design, Interface design, Flash animation, Character Design, Illustration, Infographics, Icons, cartoons, caricatures etc.

raw_text:
Anirban Dey

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader

✉  romeldey@gmail.com

📞  +91 9811587800

📍  FU 31, Flat-D2, Tower-6, Sector-103, Chhattarpur, Gurgaon – 110074

🔗  linkedin.com/in/romeldey









PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

OEM Partner Management

Solution & Consultative Selling

Product Lifecycle Management

Government Body Engagement

BOQ / BOM & Techno-Commercial

Compliance & Certification

Nationwide Sales Support

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem



PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.



EDUCATION



2010

MBA – Information Systems

Sikkim Manipal University

2001

B.Sc. (Hons) – Economics, Statistics & Mathematics

University of Calcutta

1998

Higher Secondary (Science)

W.B.C.H.S.E.

1996

Madhyamik Pariksha

W.B.B.S.E.



PROFESSIONAL CERTIFICATIONS & QUALIFICATIONS



2006

ACNP – Advanced Computer Network Professional | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2005

CIC – Certificate in Computing | IGNOU

2004

CompTIA Network+ (N+) | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2003

Techno Month – Unix, NT & Linux | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2003

Certificate in Computer Hardware Maintenance | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2002

DOEACC 'A' Level – PC Software, Business Systems, System Analysis & MIS



LANGUAGES



English  |  Hindi  |  Bengali



PERSONAL DETAILS



Date of Birth:	25 November 1979

Family:	Parents, Wife & Two Daughters

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

cv_suggestions: Add a dedicated 'Post-Sales Customer Success' bullet under your AMD India role highlighting specific outcomes like customer retention rates, escalation resolution timelines, or NPS improvements — this is the most frequently missing skill across matched jobs and directly maps to your After-Sales Support experience.

Create a 'Technical Architecture & Debug' subsection in your AMD FAE role that calls out silicon-level debug activities (e.g., CPU/GPU performance bottlenecking, BIOS/firmware troubleshooting, PCIe or memory subsystem validation) to address the gap in deep silicon-level debug and formal technical architecture documentation.

Add a 'Lead Qualification & Pipeline Management' line to your Pre-Sales or FAE experience explicitly mentioning inbound lead triage, technical qualification criteria, or CRM tools used (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) — matched job titles like Pre-Sales Engineer and Solutions Architect consistently flag this as missing.

Include a 'Regional Market Expertise' section or tag within your profile summary that explicitly names Bangalore alongside your existing nationwide coverage, since Bangalore-specific relationships are a recurring requirement for India-based FAE and Solutions Architect roles you are matching to.

Incorporate EDA or simulation tools (e.g., SPICE, Cadence, Synopsys, or AMD-specific tools like ROCm, Ryzen Master, or CodeXL) into your skills section or AMD role bullets — EDA Tools Expertise appears in matched FAE job descriptions and your current resume has no mention of any toolchain.

Reframe your Pantel Technologies Product Manager experience to highlight any Software/IT Services or SaaS-adjacent work (e.g., OS provisioning, MDM software, cloud-based device management) and quantify software revenue or partner integrations to close the Software/IT Services domain gap flagged across matched roles.

raw_text:
Profile

I am a Project Management professional with expertise in industry best practices such as Agile methodologies and SCRUM. Also serving as a Customer Experience Lead for AI products, with a strong emphasis on enhancing AI product development, generating insights out of AI and user conversation, and writing prompts in GenAI tool to get the designated tasks completed out of Assistant. 

I have comprehensive experience across the entire project lifecycle, including planning, requirements analysis and scoping, effort estimation, risk assessment, product demonstrations, automation, process optimization, user experience enhancement, and data analysis for actionable insights. I am known as a collaborative team player with a positive attitude and a strong ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 





Work Experience



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2023 – Present) Delivery ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Currently managing product BUILDER and Learner Pathways development and releases for the client PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), with responsibility for project/sprint planning, design and requirement document, test cases and technical architecture reviews, sprint demos, and technical architecture oversight. Leading the product for the third consecutive year. Collaborating with the PwC development and deployment team for successful integration of the BUILDER and Learner Pathways to their Plan and Learn platform.

Led the delivery of Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) version 6.0 for MetLife over the past 5 years, overseeing all phases from planning to execution.

Managing client and stakeholder relationships, including responsibilities such as product demonstrations, requirement analysis, scope and timeline planning, sprint creation and allocations, risk identification and mitigation, budget preparation, and feature release coordination. 

Planning and overseeing the entire project lifecycle, including progress monitoring, UX design review, user guide and test case validation, task and query management, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensuring on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to maintain quality and meet deadlines through innovative and efficient practices by providing detailed requirement explanations to technical, UI-UX, and QA teams, and by ensuring alignment and clarity across functions.

Leading project data presentations during internal governance calls to report progress and key metrics.

Serving as a member of the AI Customer Experience Group, contributing to user-focused enhancements for AI solutions. Actively engaged in prompt writing, contributing to the development of effective, high-quality AI-driven content.

Participating in AI product development initiatives for global clients such as The Writing Revolution, Coca-Cola, Qatar Airways, and Kyndryl. 

Involved in AI based insights generation for conversational data. Involved in the management of NAIRA chatbot which is part of our intranet platform iniitian portal. 

Was involved in the successful end-to-end development lifecycle of Boehringer Ingelheim. Here we have used our own product CXP and have evolved it to meet the requirement. 



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2 years: July 2021 – July 2023) Sr. Project ManagerLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Managed the Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) for MetLife, overseeing version 5.0 and driving the transition to version 6.0. 

Managed the CXP platform for approximately 20 clients, including high-profile names like Intel, Biogen, BMS, Rolls Royce, Boeing, Bank of America, Getinge, MYOB, Anglo American, Qatar Airways, Boehringer Ingelheim and more.

Client and Stakeholder Management: Lead product demonstrations, conduct requirements analysis, manage scope and timeline planning, drive process optimization, create sprints, allocate tasks, identify and mitigate risks, oversee budget management, and coordinate feature releases. 

Planned and monitored the entire project, ensuring seamless alignment across all phases, including UX design reviews, user guide validation, test case analysis, task management, query resolution, technical documentation, and data preparation for analytics.

Ensured on-time sprint delivery, mentoring team members to meet deadlines while maintaining high quality, adhering to requirements, and utilizing innovative solutions for efficient execution. 

Presented project data during governance calls, delivering clear updates and key metrics on project progress.

Collaborated with internal teams and departments to collect feedback, address queries, and proactively enhance user experience and customer satisfaction.

Engaged in data analytics, extracting actionable insights to drive product improvements and optimize performance.



NIIT Limited, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)		 	   	(2+ years: Jan 2019 – July 2021) Technical SpecialistLearning Technology Corporate

Project Management responsibilities: 

Led requirement analysis, assessed technical feasibility, and established the product flow for various projects. 

Served as the Technical Project Manager for Distribution Advantage Platform (DAP) (versions 2.0, 3.0, 4.0), UX Design, Virtual Induction/Onboarding, Data Formation for Analytics, and Micro Learning Authoring Platform—NIIT’s core product. MetLife was the primary client for these platforms.

Successfully delivered the Knowledge Management System (KMS) UI and execution, a platform containing various real estate resources integrated into e-Learning courses. This system is primarily used by RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Demonstrated strong project management capabilities, including end-to-end planning, effective communication with cross-functional teams, and the formation of development teams to execute projects successfully.



Client Communication: 

Managed client and stakeholder relationships, including conducting product demonstrations, setting up kick-off calls, understanding assignment scopes, documenting Minutes of Meetings (MoM), and allocating tasks.



Technical support, Quality Review & Mentoring: 

Contributed to UX design, ensuring the interface was user-friendly and clutter-free. Primarily used PowerPoint and Photoshop to ideate design and navigation flow.

Conducted product reviews, providing feedback to team members on quality improvement, meeting standards, reducing rework, and boosting productivity.

Provided technical guidance to project team members to help them achieve project-related objectives.

Actively mentored team members and conducted Technical Excellence training across teams and business units within NIIT.



NIIT Ltd, Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR) 					 (8.8 years: April’10 – Dec 2018)

Technical Specialist Learning Content Technology, CLG (Corporate Learning Group)

Technical Project Management Responsibilities:

Developed the architecture for e-Learning using Lectora'11, which is now actively used in the production of over 200 courses for RECO, a Canada-based real estate agency.

Created the architecture and POC for an automation tool (Bullet) that extracts content from MS Word and integrates it into Lectora's published package, also structuring courses as specified in MS Word. This tool reduced course production time by 60% and helped NIIT save costs equivalent to approximately 10 Lectora licenses. 

Designed the UX architecture for the Media Assets Library (PIXO), optimizing content management and user experience. 

Developed an HTML5-based e-Learning engine/framework, which was used to produce over 40 courses and assessments for IQVIA. Was also responsible for overseeing project execution and management.

Created various e-Learning frameworks for high-profile clients such as IQVIA, Philips, SAP, Rio Tinto, MetLife, Lavoro, and ITT. Utilized tools such as Articulate Storyline, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Articulate Presenter, Adobe Captivate, and Lectora.

Gained hands-on experience with Learning Management Systems (LMS) such as SumTotal, SuccessFactors, Cornerstone, Saba, MTS, and Moodle.  

Client Management & Ways of working:

Collaborated with clients such as IQVIA, SAP, Rio Tinto, and RECO to provide technical solutions and oversee project execution.

Took responsibility for the preparation and presentation of the Management Operating Review (MOR) deck to senior management. 

Organized and conducted technical training sessions and team meetings to ensure knowledge sharing and project alignment.







Melco, United States					        	(8 months: Aug 2009 – Mar 2010)

Technical ConsultantSupported remotely (Worked from Home) 

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to an e-commerce project utilizing Flash ActionScript 2.0, ASP.NET, and SQL Server technologies. The project involved the development of the online designer tool. 





XentaQsys Technologies Pvt. Ltd., Gurgaon (Delhi-NCR)  (10 months: Jun 2008 – Mar 2009)

Project/Team Lead 

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on a Content Management System (FLOEDIT) for Deutsche Telekom, a Germany-based client, focused on managing eLearning content. The system allowed the client to publish content in three formats: Flash, HTML, and PDF. 

Visited Germany for 3 months to conduct requirement analysis and support the development of the project.





R systems International Ltd., Noida			      	(2.2 years: Apr 2006 – May 2008)

Software Engineer

Technical Responsibilities:

Primarily worked on US based various clients using Adobe Flash, HTML, CSS, JavaScript.





GE Content Solution (GENPACT)., Gurgaon		      	(6 months: Sep 2005 – Feb 2006)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Worked on various e-learning projects, developing interactive tasks for systems like Lean, Oracle Advanced Planning & Scheduling, Oracle Fixed Assets, Oracle Process Manufacturing, Oracle Discrete Manufacturing, cBOM Editor, SWB Sales Compensation, and the GE Healthcare ROI Tool.





Magic Software Pvt. Ltd., Noida				      	(4 months: May 2005 – Aug 2005)

Flash Programmer

Technical Responsibilities:

Contributed to e-learning projects by developing interactive tasks for Negotiating Women, Skillsoft, Daydream, Toyota Car Competition, and Clean Power with Amaze.





Academics

MCA – Shobhit University							

BCA – Patna University

cv_suggestions: Explicitly name JIRA and MS Project in your skills section and within role bullet points — for example, 'Managed sprint planning and backlog grooming using JIRA across 3 concurrent delivery tracks' — since this is the single most frequent gap across matched Delivery Manager and Agile Delivery Lead roles.

Add a dedicated bullet under your Delivery Manager role at NIIT that quantifies multi-geography team management, such as 'Led cross-functional teams of 15+ members across India, US, and APAC time zones,' to directly address the multi-geography scale gap seen in Offshore Delivery Manager postings.

Incorporate Waterfall methodology explicitly into your resume, noting any hybrid Agile-Waterfall projects you have managed — for example, 'Delivered 3 fixed-scope L&D programs using Waterfall SDLC while transitioning team to Agile SCRUM' — since matched Project Manager and Delivery Manager roles frequently require both methodologies.

Add a 'Customer Success & Revenue Impact' bullet to your Sr. Project Manager role that references upsell or contract renewal outcomes, such as 'Supported contract renewals and expanded scope resulting in 20% revenue growth on key accounts,' targeting the Strategic Success Manager roles that require upsell and revenue accountability.

Create a brief 'Tools & Platforms' section that lists JIRA, MS Project, and any Customer Success or CRM tools you have used (e.g., Salesforce, Gainsight, or equivalents), since Strategic Success Manager and Specialist roles explicitly screen for formal customer success tooling and named platform proficiency.

Strengthen your AI and technology delivery bullets by tying them to measurable business outcomes in learning content or publishing workflows — for example, 'Oversaw end-to-end AI-assisted content production pipeline reducing authoring cycle time by 30%' — to bridge the content authoring and publishing workflow gap and differentiate your profile for Specialist and Agile Delivery Lead roles in edtech and media adjacents.

raw_text:
Anirban Dey
romeldey@gmail.com
9811587800
India

SUMMARY
Seasoned Design Head with nearly two decades of progressive experience in graphic design, creative direction, and visual communication across leading organizations in the education and digital solutions sectors. Proven track record of leading design teams, driving brand identity, and delivering high-impact creative solutions that align with business objectives. Adept at combining artistic vision with strategic thinking to elevate design standards and mentor emerging creative talent.

SKILLS
Graphic Design, Creative Direction, Visual Communication, Brand Identity, Typography, Layout Design, Clear Communication, Team Leadership, Creative Strategy, Design Thinking

EXPERIENCE
Design Head at Bestine Digital Solutions (2012 – Present)
• Led the end-to-end design function, overseeing brand strategy, visual identity, and creative output across all digital and print channels.
• Directed and mentored a team of designers, establishing design standards, workflows, and best practices to ensure consistent quality delivery.
• Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders including marketing, product, and leadership teams to align creative vision with business goals.
• Spearheaded the development of innovative design solutions that enhanced client engagement and strengthened brand presence in competitive markets.
• Managed multiple high-priority design projects simultaneously, ensuring on-time delivery within scope and budget.
Senior Graphic Designer at Knowledge Platform (2009 – 2012)
• Conceptualized and executed visually compelling designs for e-learning platforms, marketing collateral, and digital media assets.
• Collaborated with content and instructional design teams to create engaging and user-friendly visual experiences for diverse learner audiences.
• Elevated the visual quality of platform interfaces and communication materials, contributing to improved user engagement metrics.
• Mentored junior designers and provided creative guidance to maintain brand consistency across all deliverables.
• Streamlined design production processes, reducing turnaround times while maintaining high creative standards.
Graphic Designer at NIIT (2006 – 2009)
• Designed graphics and visual content for educational materials, course catalogs, brochures, and digital assets.
• Developed creative layouts and illustrations that effectively communicated complex educational concepts to target audiences.
• Contributed to the visual branding of NIIT's marketing campaigns, ensuring alignment with corporate identity guidelines.
• Collaborated with the marketing and content teams to produce timely, high-quality design deliverables across multiple projects.
• Built foundational expertise in print and digital design tools, establishing a strong base for career advancement.

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Science —  ()

CERTIFICATIONS
Arena Multimedia – Graphic Design Certification

Contributed to the visual branding of NIIT's marketing campaigns, ensuring alignment with corporate identity guidelines.
Collaborated with the marketing and content teams to produce timely, high-quality design deliverables across multiple projects.
Built foundational expertise in print and digital design tools, establishing a strong base for career advancement.

certifications: Arena Multimedia – Graphic Design Certification
cv_suggestions: Add 'Copywriting' and 'Copywriting Strategy' explicitly to your skills section and describe in your Design Head role how you collaborated on or directed brand messaging, taglines, or campaign copy — many Creative Director roles expect ownership of both visual and verbal identity.

Include 'Storyboarding' and 'Video Production' in your skills and add a bullet under your Design Head or Senior Graphic Designer role describing any video campaigns, reels, or motion content you directed or contributed to, even if execution was handled by a team.

Add 'Social Media Content Direction' to your skills and quantify its impact — for example, reference the number of platforms managed, content volume (e.g., '50+ assets/month'), or engagement improvements achieved under your creative leadership at Bestine Digital Solutions.

Introduce 'Performance Marketing Analytics' or 'Performance Analytics Integration' by adding a bullet that links your creative output to measurable business results — e.g., 'Directed creative strategy for paid campaigns resulting in X% improvement in CTR/conversion' — to signal data-informed design thinking.

Address the 'B2B Brand Experience' gap by explicitly naming any B2B clients, industries (SaaS, enterprise, EdTech), or business-facing campaigns in your role descriptions at Bestine Digital Solutions or Knowledge Platform, as most matched Creative Director roles target B2B contexts.

Add a 'Tools & Platforms' subsection listing motion/video tools (Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, or similar) and any paid social platforms (Meta Ads, YouTube) you have exposure to, directly targeting the 'Cinematic/Motion Content' and 'Paid Social/Video Channel Strategy' gaps flagged across matched roles.

raw_text:
Anirban Dey

Senior Technical Pre-Sales & Field Application Engineering Leader

✉  romeldey@gmail.com

📞  +91 9811587800

📍  FU 31, Flat-D2, Tower-6, Sector-103, Chhattarpur, Gurgaon – 110074

🔗  linkedin.com/in/romeldey









PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY



Results-driven Technical Pre-Sales Leader with 25 years of experience spanning IT hardware OEM ecosystems, government procurement, and enterprise solution selling. Currently serving as FAE / Field Support Manager at AMD India (10 years), driving OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, and Dell, and managing strategic positioning on the GeM marketplace. Deep hands-on expertise in government body engagement — MeitY, NIC, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, DOITC — with a consistent track record of converting technical consultations into tender wins. Known for building national-level client relationships, leading RFP/bid processes, and delivering product roadmaps that accelerate deal closures across enterprise and government segments.



CORE COMPETENCIES



Technical Pre-Sales & FAE

GeM Marketplace Management

Government Tender & RFP Wins

OEM Partner Management

Solution & Consultative Selling

Product Lifecycle Management

Government Body Engagement

BOQ / BOM & Techno-Commercial

Compliance & Certification

Nationwide Sales Support

Product Demos & Roadmaps

"Make in India" Ecosystem



PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

FAE / Field Support Manager	Nov 2015 – Present  (10 Years)

AMD India Pvt. Ltd. | Delhi-NCR

National pre-sales and field application engineering lead, supporting business development across all major OEM accounts and government procurement channels.



Supported Business Development Managers across 10+ states, contributing to multi-crore annual revenue pipeline through targeted client acquisition and account management.

Built and maintained strategic OEM partnerships with HP, Acer, Lenovo, Dell, and "Make in India" entities, driving AMD product positioning and preference in commercial and government bids.

Managed AMD's presence on the GeM (Government e-Marketplace) portal — coordinating OEM listings, compliance documentation, and strategic positioning to maximise visibility and win rates.

Developed strong stakeholder relationships with government bodies including MeitY, NIC, MAIT, HARTRON, ELCOT, KELTRON, and DOITC, influencing large-scale procurement decisions in AMD's favour.

Led end-to-end RFP/tender submissions — from technical specification writing and BOQ preparation to competitive pricing strategy — securing significant government and enterprise tender wins.

Delivered persuasive product demos, technical consultations, and AMD roadmap presentations to C-level and technical decision-makers, accelerating deal closures.

Acted as the primary technical interface between AMD and OEM/channel partners, resolving product queries, qualification requirements, and go-to-market alignment issues.



Product Manager	Apr 2015 – Nov 2015  (8 Months)

Pantel Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (PENTA) | Delhi & Noida

Directed full product lifecycle management — from strategic planning and SKU finalisation to go-to-market execution across education and government segments.

Managed tender desk operations, ensuring technical compliance and commercially competitive bid submissions.

Conducted market research and customer visits to define product strategy; collaborated with system integrators and government agencies to expand reach.

Oversaw product certifications (UL, FCC, Energy Star, Microsoft, BOSS Linux), strengthening sales credibility for government and institutional buyers.

Delivered system demonstrations and technical presentations to government procurement teams, building buyer confidence and influencing specification writing.



Product Manager	Dec 2013 – Nov 2014  (1 Year)

Vardhaman Technology Pvt. Ltd. (PANACHE) | Mumbai & Gujarat

Finalised product SKUs and benchmarking parameters to align portfolio with customer needs and competitive market positioning.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement national sales and product positioning initiatives.

Expanded partner relationships to strengthen distribution channels and deepen market penetration in Western India.

Supported e-waste and recycling sustainability initiatives, enhancing the brand's environmental credentials.



Sr. Analyst – Pre-Sales & Operations	Aug 2005 – Mar 2013  (7.5 Years)

R P Infosystems Ltd. (Chirag Brand) | Kolkata

Secured key product certifications — BEE, TCO, Energy Star, FCC, STQC — enabling access to government and enterprise procurement channels.

Positioned the "Chirag" brand as a Greenpeace-listed organisation, materially enhancing buyer confidence in institutional and CSR-driven procurements.

Managed DGS&D rate contracts and government tenders; drove competitive participation across pan-India bids.

Delivered nationwide product demonstrations and factory inspections for government and corporate clients across multiple states.

Directed regional after-sales support across multi-state geographies, ensuring customer retention and loyalty.



Executive – Lab Administration & Hardware Support	Oct 2001 – Jul 2005  (4 Years)

NIIT Ltd. | Kolkata

Managed lab administration and hardware support across school networks, ensuring high uptime and customer satisfaction.

Delivered end-user training and faculty sessions, building strong communication, presentation, and technical support skills.



EDUCATION



2010

MBA – Information Systems

Sikkim Manipal University

2001

B.Sc. (Hons) – Economics, Statistics & Mathematics

University of Calcutta

1998

Higher Secondary (Science)

W.B.C.H.S.E.

1996

Madhyamik Pariksha

W.B.B.S.E.



PROFESSIONAL CERTIFICATIONS & QUALIFICATIONS



2006

ACNP – Advanced Computer Network Professional | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2005

CIC – Certificate in Computing | IGNOU

2004

CompTIA Network+ (N+) | Indian Institute of Hardware Technology

2003

Techno Month – Unix, NT & Linux | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2003

Certificate in Computer Hardware Maintenance | CMC Limited (Govt. of India Enterprise)

2002

DOEACC 'A' Level – PC Software, Business Systems, System Analysis & MIS



LANGUAGES



English  |  Hindi  |  Bengali



PERSONAL DETAILS



Date of Birth:	25 November 1979

Family:	Parents, Wife & Two Daughters







I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.
